chapters.zh: 以下所记的是摩西在约但河东的旷野、疏弗对面的亚拉巴 ─ 就是巴兰、陀弗、拉班、哈洗录、底撒哈中间 ─ 向以色列众人所说的话。
chapters.en: These the words which Moses spake unto all Israel on this side Jordan in the wilderness, in the plain over against the Red , between Paran, and Tophel, and Laban, and Hazeroth, and Dizahab.

chapters.zh: 从何烈山经过西珥山到加低斯巴尼亚有十一天的路程。）
chapters.en: ( eleven days' from Horeb by the way of mount Seir unto Kadeshbarnea.)

chapters.zh: 出埃及第四十年十一月初一日，摩西照耶和华藉著他所吩咐以色列人的话都晓谕他们。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the fortieth year, in the eleventh month, on the first of the month, Moses spake unto the children of Israel, according unto all that the LORD had given him in commandment unto them;

chapters.zh: 那时，他已经击杀了住希实本的亚摩利王西宏和住以得来、亚斯他录的巴珊王噩。
chapters.en: After he had slain Sihon the king of the Amorites, which dwelt in Heshbon, and Og the king of Bashan, which dwelt at Astaroth in Edrei:

chapters.zh: 摩西在约但河东的摩押地讲律法说：
chapters.en: On this side Jordan, in the land of Moab, began Moses to declare this law, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 我们的神在何烈山晓谕我们说：你们在这山上住的日子够了；
chapters.en: The LORD our God spake unto us in Horeb, saying, Ye have dwelt long enough in this mount:

chapters.zh: 要起行转到亚摩利人的山地和靠近这山地的各处，就是亚拉巴、山地、高原、南地，沿海一带迦南人的地，并利巴嫩山又到伯拉大河。
chapters.en: Turn you, and take your journey, and go to the mount of the Amorites, and unto all nigh thereunto, in the plain, in the hills, and in the vale, and in the south, and by the sea side, to the land of the Canaanites, and unto Lebanon, unto the great river, the river Euphrates.

chapters.zh: 如今我将这地摆在你们面前；你们要进去得这地，就是耶和华向你们列祖亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓应许赐给他们和他们后裔为业之地。
chapters.en: Behold, I have set the land before you: go in and possess the land which the LORD sware unto your fathers, Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob, to give unto them and to their seed after them.

chapters.zh: 那时，我对你们说：管理你们的重任，我独自担当不起。
chapters.en: And I spake unto you at that time, saying, I am not able to bear you myself alone:

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你们的神使你们多起来。看哪，你们今日像天上的星那样多。
chapters.en: The LORD your God hath multiplied you, and, behold, ye this day as the stars of heaven for multitude.

chapters.zh: 惟愿耶和华 ─ 你们列祖的神使你们比如今更多千倍，照他所应许你们的话赐福与你们。
chapters.en: (The LORD God of your fathers make you a thousand times so many more as ye , and bless you, as he hath promised you!)

chapters.zh: 但你们的麻烦，和管理你们的重任，并你们的争讼，我独自一人怎能担当得起呢？
chapters.en: How can I myself alone bear your cumbrance, and your burden, and your strife?

chapters.zh: 你们要按著各支派选举有智慧、有见识、为众人所认识的，我立他们为你们的首领。
chapters.en: Take you wise men, and understanding, and known among your tribes, and I will make them rulers over you.

chapters.zh: 你们回答我说：照你所说的行了为妙。
chapters.en: And ye answered me, and said, The thing which thou hast spoken good to do.

chapters.zh: 我便将你们各支派的首领，有智慧、为众人所认识的，照你们的支派，立他们为官长、千夫长、百夫长、五十夫长、十夫长，管理你们。
chapters.en: So I took the chief of your tribes, wise men, and known, and made them heads over you, captains over thousands, and captains over hundreds, and captains over fifties, and captains over tens, and officers among your tribes.

chapters.zh: 当时，我嘱咐你们的审判官说：你们听讼，无论是弟兄彼此争讼，是与同居的外人争讼，都要按公义判断。
chapters.en: And I charged your judges at that time, saying, Hear between your brethren, and judge righteously between man and his brother, and the stranger with him.

chapters.zh: 审判的时候，不可看人的外貌；听讼不可分贵贱，不可惧怕人，因为审判是属乎神的。若有难断的案件，可以呈到我这里，我就判断。
chapters.en: Ye shall not respect persons in judgment; ye shall hear the small as well as the great; ye shall not be afraid of the face of man; for the judgment God's: and the cause that is too hard for you, bring unto me, and I will hear it.

chapters.zh: 那时，我将你们所当行的事都吩咐你们了。
chapters.en: And I commanded you at that time all the things which ye should do.

chapters.zh: 我们照著耶和华 ─ 我们神所吩咐的从何烈山起行，经过你们所看见那大而可怕的旷野，往亚摩利人的山地去，到了加低斯巴尼亚。
chapters.en: And when we departed from Horeb, we went through all that great and terrible wilderness, which ye saw by the way of the mountain of the Amorites, as the LORD our God commanded us; and we came to Kadeshbarnea.

chapters.zh: 我对你们说：你们已经到了耶和华 ─ 我们神所赐给我们的亚摩利人之山地。
chapters.en: And I said unto you, Ye are come unto the mountain of the Amorites, which the LORD our God doth give unto us.

chapters.zh: 看哪，耶和华 ─ 你的神已将那地摆在你面前，你要照耶和华 ─ 你列祖的神所说的上去得那地为业；不要惧怕，也不要惊惶。
chapters.en: Behold, the LORD thy God hath set the land before thee: go up possess , as the LORD God of thy fathers hath said unto thee; fear not, neither be discouraged.

chapters.zh: 你们都就近我来说：我们要先打发人去，为我们窥探那地，将我们上去该走何道，必进何城，都回报我们。
chapters.en: And ye came near unto me every one of you, and said, We will send men before us, and they shall search us out the land, and bring us word again by what way we must go up, and into what cities we shall come.

chapters.zh: 这话我以为美，就从你们中间选了十二个人，每支派一人。
chapters.en: And the saying pleased me well: and I took twelve men of you, one of a tribe:

chapters.zh: 于是他们起身上山地去，到以实各谷，窥探那地。
chapters.en: And they turned and went up into the mountain, and came unto the valley of Eshcol, and searched it out.

chapters.zh: 他们手里拿著那地的果子下来，到我们那里，回报说：耶和华 ─ 我们的神所赐给我们的是美地。
chapters.en: And they took of the fruit of the land in their hands, and brought down unto us, and brought us word again, and said, a good land which the LORD our God doth give us.

chapters.zh: 你们却不肯上去，竟违背了耶和华 ─ 你们神的命令，
chapters.en: Notwithstanding ye would not go up, but rebelled against the commandment of the LORD your God:

chapters.zh: 在帐棚内发怨言说：耶和华因为恨我们，所以将我们从埃及地领出来，要交在亚摩利人手中，除灭我们。
chapters.en: And ye murmured in your tents, and said, Because the LORD hated us, he hath brought us forth out of the land of Egypt, to deliver us into the hand of the Amorites, to destroy us.

chapters.zh: 我们上那里去呢？我们的弟兄使我们的心消化，说那地的民比我们又大又高，城邑又广大又坚固，高得顶天，并且我们在那里看见亚衲族的人。
chapters.en: Whither shall we go up? our brethren have discouraged our heart, saying, The people greater and taller than we; the cities great and walled up to heaven; and moreover we have seen the sons of the Anakims there.

chapters.zh: 我就对你们说：不要惊恐，也不要怕他们。
chapters.en: Then I said unto you, Dread not, neither be afraid of them.

chapters.zh: 在你们前面行的耶和华 ─ 你们的神必为你们争战，正如他在埃及和旷野，在你们眼前所行的一样。
chapters.en: The LORD your God which goeth before you, he shall fight for you, according to all that he did for you in Egypt before your eyes;

chapters.zh: 你们在旷野所行的路上，也曾见耶和华 ─ 你们的神抚养你们，如同人抚养儿子一般，直等你们来到这地方。
chapters.en: And in the wilderness, where thou hast seen how that the LORD thy God bare thee, as a man doth bear his son, in all the way that ye went, until ye came into this place.

chapters.zh: 你们在这事上却不信耶和华 ─ 你们的神。
chapters.en: Yet in this thing ye did not believe the LORD your God,

chapters.zh: 他在路上，在你们前面行，为你们找安营的地方；夜间在火柱里，日间在云柱里，指示你们所当行的路。
chapters.en: Who went in the way before you, to search you out a place to pitch your tents , in fire by night, to shew you by what way ye should go, and in a cloud by day.

chapters.zh: 耶和华听见你们这话，就发怒，起誓说：
chapters.en: And the LORD heard the voice of your words, and was wroth, and sware, saying,

chapters.zh: 这恶世代的人，连一个也不得见我起誓应许赐给你们列祖的美地；
chapters.en: Surely there shall not one of these men of this evil generation see that good land, which I sware to give unto your fathers,

chapters.zh: 惟有耶孚尼的儿子迦勒必得看见，并且我要将他所踏过的地 { 赐给他和他的子孙，因为他专心跟从我。
chapters.en: Save Caleb the son of Jephunneh; he shall see it, and to him will I give the land that he hath trodden upon, and to his children, because he hath wholly followed the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华为你们的缘故也向我发怒，说：你必不得进入那地。
chapters.en: Also the LORD was angry with me for your sakes, saying, Thou also shalt not go in thither.

chapters.zh: 伺候你、嫩的儿子约书亚，他必得进入那地；你要勉励他，因为他要使以色列人承受那地为业。
chapters.en: Joshua the son of Nun, which standeth before thee, he shall go in thither: encourage him: for he shall cause Israel to inherit it.

chapters.zh: 并且你们的妇人孩子，就是你们所说、必被掳掠的，和今日不知善恶的儿女，必进入那地。我要将那地赐给他们，他们必得为业。
chapters.en: Moreover your little ones, which ye said should be a prey, and your children, which in that day had no knowledge between good and evil, they shall go in thither, and unto them will I give it, and they shall possess it.

chapters.zh: 至于你们，要转回，从红海的路往旷野去。
chapters.en: But you, turn you, and take your journey into the wilderness by the way of the Red sea.

chapters.zh: 那时，你们回答我说：我们得罪了耶和华，情愿照耶和华 ─ 我们神一切所吩咐的上去争战。于是你们各人带著兵器，争先上山地去了。
chapters.en: Then ye answered and said unto me, We have sinned against the LORD, we will go up and fight, according to all that the LORD our God commanded us. And when ye had girded on every man his weapons of war, ye were ready to go up into the hill.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐我说：你对他们说：不要上去，也不要争战；因我不在你们中间，恐怕你们被仇敌杀败了。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto me, Say unto them, Go not up, neither fight; for I not among you; lest ye be smitten before your enemies.

chapters.zh: 我就告诉了你们，你们却不听从，竟违背耶和华的命令，擅自上山地去了。
chapters.en: So I spake unto you; and ye would not hear, but rebelled against the commandment of the LORD, and went presumptuously up into the hill.

chapters.zh: 住那山地的亚摩利人就出来攻击你们，追赶你们，如蜂拥一般，在西珥杀退你们，直到何珥玛。
chapters.en: And the Amorites, which dwelt in that mountain, came out against you, and chased you, as bees do, and destroyed you in Seir, unto Hormah.

chapters.zh: 你们便回来，在耶和华面前哭号；耶和华却不听你们的声音，也不向你们侧耳。
chapters.en: And ye returned and wept before the LORD; but the LORD would not hearken to your voice, nor give ear unto you.

chapters.zh: 于是你们在加低斯住了许多日子。
chapters.en: So ye abode in Kadesh many days, according unto the days that ye abode .

chapters.zh: 此后，我们转回，从红海的路往旷野去，是照耶和华所吩咐我的。我们在西珥山绕行了许多日子。
chapters.en: Then we turned, and took our journey into the wilderness by the way of the Red sea, as the LORD spake unto me: and we compassed mount Seir many days.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对我说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto me, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们绕行这山的日子够了，要转向北去。
chapters.en: Ye have compassed this mountain long enough: turn you northward.

chapters.zh: 你吩咐百姓说：你们弟兄以扫的子孙住在西珥，你们要经过他们的境界。他们必惧怕你们，所以你们要分外谨慎。
chapters.en: And command thou the people, saying, Ye to pass through the coast of your brethren the children of Esau, which dwell in Seir; and they shall be afraid of you: take ye good heed unto yourselves therefore:

chapters.zh: 不可与他们争战；他们的地，连脚掌可踏之处，我都不给你们，因我已将西珥山赐给以扫为业。
chapters.en: Meddle not with them; for I will not give you of their land, no, not so much as a foot breadth; because I have given mount Seir unto Esau a possession.

chapters.zh: 你们要用钱向他们买粮吃，也要用钱向他们买水喝。
chapters.en: Ye shall buy meat of them for money, that ye may eat; and ye shall also buy water of them for money, that ye may drink.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华 ─ 你的神在你手里所办的一切事上已赐福与你。你走这大旷野，他都知道了。这四十年，耶和华 ─ 你的神常与你同在，故此你一无所缺。
chapters.en: For the LORD thy God hath blessed thee in all the works of thy hand: he knoweth thy walking through this great wilderness: these forty years the LORD thy God with thee; thou hast lacked nothing.

chapters.zh: 于是，我们离了我们弟兄以扫子孙所住的西珥，从亚拉巴的路，经过以拉他、以旬迦别，转向摩押旷野的路去。
chapters.en: And when we passed by from our brethren the children of Esau, which dwelt in Seir, through the way of the plain from Elath, and from Eziongaber, we turned and passed by the way of the wilderness of Moab.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐我说：不可扰害摩押人，也不可与他们争战。他们的地，我不赐给你为业，因我已将亚珥赐给罗得的子孙为业。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto me, Distress not the Moabites, neither contend with them in battle: for I will not give thee of their land a possession; because I have given Ar unto the children of Lot a possession.

chapters.zh: （先前，有以米人住在那里，民数众多，身体高大，像亚衲人一样。
chapters.en: The Emims dwelt therein in times past, a people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakims;

chapters.zh: 这以米人像亚衲人；也算为利乏音人；摩押人称他们为以米人。
chapters.en: Which also were accounted giants, as the Anakims; but the Moabites call them Emims.

chapters.zh: 先前，何利人也住在西珥，但以扫的子孙将他们除灭，得了他们的地，接著居住，就如以色列在耶和华赐给他为业之地所行的一样。）
chapters.en: The Horims also dwelt in Seir beforetime; but the children of Esau succeeded them, when they had destroyed them from before them, and dwelt in their stead; as Israel did unto the land of his possession, which the LORD gave unto them.

chapters.zh: 现在，起来过撒烈溪！于是我们过了撒烈溪。
chapters.en: Now rise up, , and get you over the brook Zered. And we went over the brook Zered.

chapters.zh: 自从离开加低斯巴尼亚，到过了撒烈溪的时候，共有三十八年，等那世代的兵丁都从营中灭尽，正如耶和华向他们所起的誓。
chapters.en: And the space in which we came from Kadeshbarnea, until we were come over the brook Zered, thirty and eight years; until all the generation of the men of war were wasted out from among the host, as the LORD sware unto them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的手也攻击他们，将他们从营中除灭，直到灭尽。
chapters.en: For indeed the hand of the LORD was against them, to destroy them from among the host, until they were consumed.

chapters.zh: 兵丁从民中都灭尽死亡以后，
chapters.en: So it came to pass, when all the men of war were consumed and dead from among the people,

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐我说：
chapters.en: That the LORD spake unto me, saying,

chapters.zh: 你今天要从摩押的境界亚珥经过，
chapters.en: Thou art to pass over through Ar, the coast of Moab, this day:

chapters.zh: 走近亚扪人之地，不可扰害他们，也不可与他们争战。亚扪人的地，我不赐给你们为业，因我已将那地赐给罗得的子孙为业。
chapters.en: And thou comest nigh over against the children of Ammon, distress them not, nor meddle with them: for I will not give thee of the land of the children of Ammon possession; because I have given it unto the children of Lot a possession.

chapters.zh: （那地也算为利乏音人之地，先前利乏音人住在那里，亚扪人称他们为散送冥。
chapters.en: (That also was accounted a land of giants: giants dwelt therein in old time; and the Ammonites call them Zamzummims;

chapters.zh: 那民众多，身体高大，像亚衲人一样，但耶和华从亚扪人面前除灭他们，亚扪人就得了他们的地，接著居住。
chapters.en: A people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakims; but the LORD destroyed them before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead:

chapters.zh: 正如耶和华从前为住西珥的以扫子孙将何利人从他们面前除灭、他们得了何利人的地、接著居住一样，直到今日。
chapters.en: As he did to the children of Esau, which dwelt in Seir, when he destroyed the Horims from before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead even unto this day:

chapters.zh: 从迦斐托出来的迦斐托人将先前住在乡村直到迦萨的亚卫人除灭，接著居住。）
chapters.en: And the Avims which dwelt in Hazerim, unto Azzah, the Caphtorims, which came forth out of Caphtor, destroyed them, and dwelt in their stead.)

chapters.zh: 你们起来前往，过亚嫩谷；我已将亚摩利人希实本王西宏和他的地交在你手中，你要与他争战，得他的地为业。
chapters.en: Rise ye up, take your journey, and pass over the river Arnon: behold, I have given into thine hand Sihon the Amorite, king of Heshbon, and his land: begin to possess , and contend with him in battle.

chapters.zh: 从今日起，我要使天下万民听见你的名声都惊恐惧怕，且因你发颤伤恸。
chapters.en: This day will I begin to put the dread of thee and the fear of thee upon the nations under the whole heaven, who shall hear report of thee, and shall tremble, and be in anguish because of thee.

chapters.zh: 我从基底莫的旷野差遣使者去见希实本王西宏，用和睦的话说：
chapters.en: And I sent messengers out of the wilderness of Kedemoth unto Sihon king of Heshbon with words of peace, saying,

chapters.zh: 求你容我从你的地经过，只走大道，不偏左右。
chapters.en: Let me pass through thy land: I will go along by the high way, I will neither turn unto the right hand nor to the left.

chapters.zh: 你可以卖粮给我吃，也可以卖水给我喝，只要容我步行过去，
chapters.en: Thou shalt sell me meat for money, that I may eat; and give me water for money, that I may drink: only I will pass through on my feet;

chapters.zh: 就如住西珥的以扫子孙和住亚珥的摩押人待我一样，等我过了约但河，好进入耶和华 ─ 我们神所赐给我们的地。
chapters.en: (As the children of Esau which dwell in Seir, and the Moabites which dwell in Ar, did unto me;) until I shall pass over Jordan into the land which the LORD our God giveth us.

chapters.zh: 但希实本王西宏不容我们从他那里经过；因为耶和华 ─ 你的神使他心中刚硬，性情顽梗，为要将他交在你手中，像今日一样。
chapters.en: But Sihon king of Heshbon would not let us pass by him: for the LORD thy God hardened his spirit, and made his heart obstinate, that he might deliver him into thy hand, as this day.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对我说：从此起首，我要将西宏和他的地交给你；你要得他的地为业。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto me, Behold, I have begun to give Sihon and his land before thee: begin to possess, that thou mayest inherit his land.

chapters.zh: 那时，西宏和他的众民出来攻击我们，在雅杂与我们交战。
chapters.en: Then Sihon came out against us, he and all his people, to fight at Jahaz.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 我们的神将他交给我们，我们就把他和他的儿子，并他的众民，都击杀了。
chapters.en: And the LORD our God delivered him before us; and we smote him, and his sons, and all his people.

chapters.zh: 我们夺了他的一切城邑，将有人烟的各城，连女人带孩子，尽都毁灭，没有留下一个。
chapters.en: And we took all his cities at that time, and utterly destroyed the men, and the women, and the little ones, of every city, we left none to remain:

chapters.zh: 惟有牲畜和所夺的各城，并其中的财物，都取为自己的掠物。
chapters.en: Only the cattle we took for a prey unto ourselves, and the spoil of the cities which we took.

chapters.zh: 从亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥和谷中的城，直到基列，耶和华 ─ 我们的神都交给我们了，没有一座城高得使我们不能攻取的。
chapters.en: From Aroer, which by the brink of the river of Arnon, and the city that by the river, even unto Gilead, there was not one city too strong for us: the LORD our God delivered all unto us:

chapters.zh: 惟有亚扪人之地，凡靠近雅博河的地，并山地的城邑，与耶和华 ─ 我们神所禁止我们去的地方，都没有挨近。
chapters.en: Only unto the land of the children of Ammon thou camest not, unto any place of the river Jabbok, nor unto the cities in the mountains, nor unto whatsoever the LORD our God forbad us.

chapters.zh: 以后，我们转回，向巴珊去。巴珊王噩和他的众民都出来，在以得来与我们交战。
chapters.en: Then we turned, and went up the way to Bashan: and Og the king of Bashan came out against us, he and all his people, to battle at Edrei.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对我说：不要怕他！因我已将他和他的众民，并他的地，都交在你手中；你要待他像从前待住希实本的亚摩利王西宏一样。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto me, Fear him not: for I will deliver him, and all his people, and his land, into thy hand; and thou shalt do unto him as thou didst unto Sihon king of the Amorites, which dwelt at Heshbon.

chapters.zh: 于是耶和华 ─ 我们的神也将巴珊王噩和他的众民都交在我们手中；我们杀了他们，没有留下一个。
chapters.en: So the LORD our God delivered into our hands Og also, the king of Bashan, and all his people: and we smote him until none was left to him remaining.

chapters.zh: 那时，我们夺了他所有的城，共有六十座，没有一座城不被我们所夺。这为亚珥歌伯的全境，就是巴珊地噩王的国。
chapters.en: And we took all his cities at that time, there was not a city which we took not from them, threescore cities, all the region of Argob, the kingdom of Og in Bashan.

chapters.zh: 这些城都有坚固的高墙，有门有闩。此外还有许多无城墙的乡村。
chapters.en: All these cities fenced with high walls, gates, and bars; beside unwalled towns a great many.

chapters.zh: 我们将这些都毁灭了，像从前待希实本王西宏一样，把有人烟的各城，连女人带孩子，尽都毁灭；
chapters.en: And we utterly destroyed them, as we did unto Sihon king of Heshbon, utterly destroying the men, women, and children, of every city.

chapters.zh: 惟有一切牲畜和城中的财物都取为自己的掠物。
chapters.en: But all the cattle, and the spoil of the cities, we took for a prey to ourselves.

chapters.zh: 那时，我们从约但河东两个亚摩利王的手将亚嫩谷直到黑门山之地夺过来
chapters.en: And we took at that time out of the hand of the two kings of the Amorites the land that on this side Jordan, from the river of Arnon unto mount Hermon;

chapters.zh: （这黑门山，西顿人称为西连，亚摩利人称为示尼珥），
chapters.en: ( Hermon the Sidonians call Sirion; and the Amorites call it Shenir;)

chapters.zh: 就是夺了平原的各城、基列全地、巴珊全地，直到撒迦和以得来，都是巴珊王噩国内的城邑。
chapters.en: All the cities of the plain, and all Gilead, and all Bashan, unto Salchah and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan.

chapters.zh: （利乏音人所剩下的只有巴珊王噩。他的床是铁的，长九肘，宽四肘，都是以人肘为度。现今岂不是在亚扪人的拉巴么？）
chapters.en: For only Og king of Bashan remained of the remnant of giants; behold, his bedstead a bedstead of iron; it not in Rabbath of the children of Ammon? nine cubits the length thereof, and four cubits the breadth of it, after the cubit of a man.

chapters.zh: 那时，我们得了这地。从亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥起，我将基列山地的一半，并其中的城邑，都给了流便人和迦得人。
chapters.en: And this land, we possessed at that time, from Aroer, which by the river Arnon, and half mount Gilead, and the cities thereof, gave I unto the Reubenites and to the Gadites.

chapters.zh: 其余的基列地和巴珊全地，就是噩王的国，我给了玛拿西半支派。亚珥歌伯全地乃是巴珊全地；这叫做利乏音人之地。
chapters.en: And the rest of Gilead, and all Bashan, the kingdom of Og, gave I unto the half tribe of Manasseh; all the region of Argob, with all Bashan, which was called the land of giants.

chapters.zh: 玛拿西的子孙睚珥占了亚珥歌伯全境，直到基述人和玛迦人的交界，就按自己的名称这巴珊地为哈倭特睚珥，直到今日。
chapters.en: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the country of Argob unto the coasts of Geshuri and Maachathi; and called them after his own name, Bashanhavothjair, unto this day.

chapters.zh: 我又将基列给了玛吉。
chapters.en: And I gave Gilead unto Machir.

chapters.zh: 从基列到亚嫩谷，以谷中为界，直到亚扪人交界的雅博河，我给了流便人和迦得人，
chapters.en: And unto the Reubenites and unto the Gadites I gave from Gilead even unto the river Arnon half the valley, and the border even unto the river Jabbok, the border of the children of Ammon;

chapters.zh: 又将亚拉巴和靠近约但河之地，从基尼烈直到亚拉巴海，就是盐海，并毘斯迦山根东边之地，都给了他们。
chapters.en: The plain also, and Jordan, and the coast , from Chinnereth even unto the sea of the plain, the salt sea, under Ashdothpisgah eastward.

chapters.zh: 那时，我吩咐你们说：耶和华 ─ 你们的神已将这地赐给你们为业；你们所有的勇士都要带著兵器，在你们的弟兄以色列人前面过去。
chapters.en: And I commanded you at that time, saying, The LORD your God hath given you this land to possess it: ye shall pass over armed before your brethren the children of Israel, all meet for the war.

chapters.zh: 但你们的妻子、孩子、牲畜（我知道你们有许多的牲畜）可以住在我所赐给你们的各城里。
chapters.en: But your wives, and your little ones, and your cattle, ( I know that ye have much cattle,) shall abide in your cities which I have given you;

chapters.zh: 等到你们弟兄在约但河那边，也得耶和华 ─ 你们神所赐给他们的地，又使他们得享平安，与你们一样，你们才可以回到我所赐给你们为业之地。
chapters.en: Until the LORD have given rest unto your brethren, as well as unto you, and they also possess the land which the LORD your God hath given them beyond Jordan: and shall ye return every man unto his possession, which I have given you.

chapters.zh: 那时我吩咐约书亚说：你亲眼看见了耶和华 ─ 你神向这二王所行的；耶和华也必向你所要去的各国照样行。
chapters.en: And I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, Thine eyes have seen all that the LORD your God hath done unto these two kings: so shall the LORD do unto all the kingdoms whither thou passest.

chapters.zh: 你不要怕他们，因那为你争战的是耶和华 ─ 你的神。
chapters.en: Ye shall not fear them: for the LORD your God he shall fight for you.

chapters.zh: 那时，我恳求耶和华说：
chapters.en: And I besought the LORD at that time, saying,

chapters.zh: 主耶和华阿，你已将你的大力大能显给仆人看。在天上，在地下，有甚么神能像你行事、像你有大能的作为呢？
chapters.en: O Lord GOD, thou hast begun to shew thy servant thy greatness, and thy mighty hand: for what God in heaven or in earth, that can do according to thy works, and according to thy might?

chapters.zh: 求你容我过去，看约但河那边的美地，就是那佳美的山地和利巴嫩。
chapters.en: I pray thee, let me go over, and see the good land that beyond Jordan, that goodly mountain, and Lebanon.

chapters.zh: 但耶和华因你们的缘故向我发怒，不应允我，对我说：罢了！你不要向我再题这事。
chapters.en: But the LORD was wroth with me for your sakes, and would not hear me: and the LORD said unto me, Let it suffice thee; speak no more unto me of this matter.

chapters.zh: 你且上毘斯迦山顶去，向东、西、南、北举目观望，因为你必不能过这约但河。
chapters.en: Get thee up into the top of Pisgah, and lift up thine eyes westward, and northward, and southward, and eastward, and behold with thine eyes: for thou shalt not go over this Jordan.

chapters.zh: 你却要嘱咐约书亚，勉励他，使他胆壮；因为他必在这百姓前面过去，使他们承受你所要观看之地。
chapters.en: But charge Joshua, and encourage him, and strengthen him: for he shall go over before this people, and he shall cause them to inherit the land which thou shalt see.

chapters.zh: 于是我们住在伯毘珥对面的谷中。
chapters.en: So we abode in the valley over against Bethpeor.

chapters.zh: 以色列人哪，现在我所教训你们的律例典章，你们要听从遵行，好叫你们存活，得以进入耶和华 ─ 你们列祖之神所赐给你们的地，承受为业。
chapters.en: Now therefore hearken, O Israel, unto the statutes and unto the judgments, which I teach you, for to do , that ye may live, and go in and possess the land which the LORD God of your fathers giveth you.

chapters.zh: 所吩咐你们的话，你们不可加添，也不可删减，好叫你们遵守我所吩咐的，就是耶和华 ─ 你们神的命令。
chapters.en: Ye shall not add unto the word which I command you, neither shall ye diminish from it, that ye may keep the commandments of the LORD your God which I command you.

chapters.zh: 耶和华因巴力毘珥的事所行的，你们亲眼看见了。凡随从巴力毘珥的人，耶和华 ─ 你们的神都从你们中间除灭了。
chapters.en: Your eyes have seen what the LORD did because of Baalpeor: for all the men that followed Baalpeor, the LORD thy God hath destroyed them from among you.

chapters.zh: 惟有你们专靠耶和华 ─ 你们神的人，今日全都存活。
chapters.en: But ye that did cleave unto the LORD your God alive every one of you this day.

chapters.zh: 我照著耶和华 ─ 我神所吩咐的将律例典章教训你们，使你们在所要进去得为业的地上遵行。
chapters.en: Behold, I have taught you statutes and judgments, even as the LORD my God commanded me, that ye should do so in the land whither ye go to possess it.

chapters.zh: 所以你们要谨守遵行；这就是你们在万民眼前的智慧、聪明。他们听见这一切律例，必说：这大国的人真是有智慧，有聪明！
chapters.en: Keep therefore and do ; for this your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the nations, which shall hear all these statutes, and say, Surely this great nation a wise and understanding people.

chapters.zh: 那一大国的人有神与他们相近，像耶和华 ─ 我们的神、在我们求告他的时候与我们相近呢？
chapters.en: For what nation great, who God nigh unto them, as the LORD our God in all we call upon him ?

chapters.zh: 又那一大国有这样公义的律例典章、像我今日在你们面前所陈明的这一切律法呢？
chapters.en: And what nation great, that hath statutes and judgments righteous as all this law, which I set before you this day?

chapters.zh: 你只要谨慎，殷勤保守你的心灵，免得忘记你亲眼所看见的事，又免得你一生这事离开你的心；总要传给你的子子孙孙。
chapters.en: Only take heed to thyself, and keep thy soul diligently, lest thou forget the things which thine eyes have seen, and lest they depart from thy heart all the days of thy life: but teach them thy sons, and thy sons' sons;

chapters.zh: 你在何烈山站在耶和华 ─ 你神面前的那日，耶和华对我说：你为我招聚百姓，我要叫他们听见我的话，使他们存活在世的日子，可以学习敬畏我，又可以教训儿女这样行。
chapters.en: the day that thou stoodest before the LORD thy God in Horeb, when the LORD said unto me, Gather me the people together, and I will make them hear my words, that they may learn to fear me all the days that they shall live upon the earth, and they may teach their children.

chapters.zh: 那时你们近前来，站在山下；山上有火焰冲天，并有昏黑、密云、幽暗。
chapters.en: And ye came near and stood under the mountain; and the mountain burned with fire unto the midst of heaven, with darkness, clouds, and thick darkness.

chapters.zh: 耶和华从火焰中对你们说话，你们只听见声音，却没有看见形像。
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto you out of the midst of the fire: ye heard the voice of the words, but saw no similitude; only a voice.

chapters.zh: 他将所吩咐你们当守的约指示你们，就是十条诫，并将这诫写在两块石版上。
chapters.en: And he declared unto you his covenant, which he commanded you to perform, ten commandments; and he wrote them upon two tables of stone.

chapters.zh: 那时耶和华又吩咐我将律例典章教训你们，使你们在所要过去得为业的地上遵行。
chapters.en: And the LORD commanded me at that time to teach you statutes and judgments, that ye might do them in the land whither ye go over to possess it.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要分外谨慎；因为耶和华在何烈山、从火中对你们说话的那日，你们没有看见甚么形像。
chapters.en: Take ye therefore good heed unto yourselves; for ye saw no manner of similitude on the day the LORD spake unto you in Horeb out of the midst of the fire:

chapters.zh: 惟恐你们败坏自己，雕刻偶像，彷佛甚么男像女像，
chapters.en: Lest ye corrupt , and make you a graven image, the similitude of any figure, the likeness of male or female,

chapters.zh: 或地上走兽的像，或空中飞鸟的像，
chapters.en: The likeness of any beast that on the earth, the likeness of any winged fowl that flieth in the air,

chapters.zh: 或地上爬物的像，或地底下水中鱼的像。
chapters.en: The likeness of any thing that creepeth on the ground, the likeness of any fish that in the waters beneath the earth:

chapters.zh: 又恐怕你向天举目观看，见耶和华 ─ 你的神为天下万民所摆列的日月星，就是天上的万象，自己便被勾引敬拜事奉他。
chapters.en: And lest thou lift up thine eyes unto heaven, and when thou seest the sun, and the moon, and the stars, all the host of heaven, shouldest be driven to worship them, and serve them, which the LORD thy God hath divided unto all nations under the whole heaven.

chapters.zh: 耶和华将你们从埃及领出来，脱离铁炉，要特作自己产业的子民，像今日一样。
chapters.en: But the LORD hath taken you, and brought you forth out of the iron furnace, out of Egypt, to be unto him a people of inheritance, as this day.

chapters.zh: 耶和华又因你们的缘故向我发怒，起誓必不容我过约但河，也不容我进入耶和华 ─ 你神所赐你为业的那美地。
chapters.en: Furthermore the LORD was angry with me for your sakes, and sware that I should not go over Jordan, and that I should not go in unto that good land, which the LORD thy God giveth thee an inheritance:

chapters.zh: 我只得死在这地，不能过约但河；但你们必过去得那美地。
chapters.en: But I must die in this land, I must not go over Jordan: but ye shall go over, and possess that good land.

chapters.zh: 你们要谨慎，免得忘记耶和华 ─ 你们神与你们所立的约，为自己雕刻偶像，就是耶和华 ─ 你神所禁止你做的偶像；
chapters.en: Take heed unto yourselves, lest ye forget the covenant of the LORD your God, which he made with you, and make you a graven image, the likeness of any , which the LORD thy God hath forbidden thee.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华 ─ 你的神乃是烈火，是忌邪的神。
chapters.en: For the LORD thy God a consuming fire, a jealous God.

chapters.zh: 你们在那地住久了，生子生孙，就雕刻偶像，彷佛甚么形像，败坏自己，行耶和华 ─ 你神眼中看为恶的事，惹他发怒。
chapters.en: When thou shalt beget children, and children's children, and ye shall have remained long in the land, and shall corrupt , and make a graven image, the likeness of any , and shall do evil in the sight of the LORD thy God, to provoke him to anger:

chapters.zh: 我今日呼天唤地向你们作见证，你们必在过约但河得为业的地上速速灭尽！你们不能在那地上长久，必尽行除灭。
chapters.en: I call heaven and earth to witness against you this day, that ye shall soon utterly perish from off the land whereunto ye go over Jordan to possess it; ye shall not prolong days upon it, but shall utterly be destroyed.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必使你们分散在万民中；在他所领你们到的万国里，你们剩下的人数稀少。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall scatter you among the nations, and ye shall be left few in number among the heathen, whither the LORD shall lead you.

chapters.zh: 在那里，你们必事奉人手所造的神，就是用木石造成、不能看、不能听、不能吃、不能闻的神。
chapters.en: And there ye shall serve gods, the work of men's hands, wood and stone, which neither see, nor hear, nor eat, nor smell.

chapters.zh: 但你们在那里必寻求耶和华 ─ 你的神。你尽心尽性寻求他的时候，就必寻见。
chapters.en: But if from thence thou shalt seek the LORD thy God, thou shalt find , if thou seek him with all thy heart and with all thy soul.

chapters.zh: 日后你遭遇一切患难的时候，你必归回耶和华 ─ 你的神，听从他的话。
chapters.en: When thou art in tribulation, and all these things are come upon thee, in the latter days, if thou turn to the LORD thy God, and shalt be obedient unto his voice;

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神原是有怜悯的神；他总不撇下你，不灭绝你，也不忘记他起誓与你列祖所立的约。
chapters.en: (For the LORD thy God a merciful God;) he will not forsake thee, neither destroy thee, nor forget the covenant of thy fathers which he sware unto them.

chapters.zh: 你且考察在你以前的世代，自神造人在世以来，从天这边到天那边，曾有何民听见神在火中说话的声音，像你听见还能存活呢？
chapters.en: For ask now of the days that are past, which were before thee, since the day that God created man upon the earth, and from the one side of heaven unto the other, whether there hath been as this great thing , or hath been heard like it?

chapters.zh: 这样的大事何曾有、何曾听见呢？
chapters.en: Did people hear the voice of God speaking out of the midst of the fire, as thou hast heard, and live?

chapters.zh: 神何曾从别的国中将一国的人民领出来，用试验、神迹、奇事、争战、大能的手，和伸出来的膀臂，并大可畏的事，像耶和华 ─ 你们的神在埃及，在你们眼前为你们所行的一切事呢？
chapters.en: Or hath God assayed to go take him a nation from the midst of nation, by temptations, by signs, and by wonders, and by war, and by a mighty hand, and by a stretched out arm, and by great terrors, according to all that the LORD your God did for you in Egypt before your eyes?

chapters.zh: 这是显给你看，要使你知道，惟有耶和华 ─ 他是神，除他以外，再无别神。
chapters.en: Unto thee it was shewed, that thou mightest know that the LORD he God; none else beside him.

chapters.zh: 他从天上使你听见他的声音，为要教训你，又在地上使你看见他的烈火，并且听见他从火中所说的话。
chapters.en: Out of heaven he made thee to hear his voice, that he might instruct thee: and upon earth he shewed thee his great fire; and thou heardest his words out of the midst of the fire.

chapters.zh: 因他爱你的列祖，所以拣选他们的后裔，用大能亲自领你出了埃及，
chapters.en: And because he loved thy fathers, therefore he chose their seed after them, and brought thee out in his sight with his mighty power out of Egypt;

chapters.zh: 要将比你强大的国民从你面前赶出，领你进去，将他们的地赐你为业，像今日一样。
chapters.en: To drive out nations from before thee greater and mightier than thou , to bring thee in, to give thee their land an inheritance, as this day.

chapters.zh: 所以，今日你要知道，也要记在心上，天上地下惟有耶和华他是神，除他以外，再无别神。
chapters.en: Know therefore this day, and consider in thine heart, that the LORD he God in heaven above, and upon the earth beneath: none else.

chapters.zh: 我今日将他的律例诫命晓谕你，你要遵守，使你和你的子孙可以得福，并使你的日子在耶和华 ─ 你神所赐的地上得以长久。
chapters.en: Thou shalt keep therefore his statutes, and his commandments, which I command thee this day, that it may go well with thee, and with thy children after thee, and that thou mayest prolong days upon the earth, which the LORD thy God giveth thee, for ever.

chapters.zh: 那时，摩西在约但河东，向日出之地，分定三座城，
chapters.en: Then Moses severed three cities on this side Jordan toward the sunrising;

chapters.zh: 使那素无仇恨、无心杀了人的，可以逃到这三城之中的一座城，就得存活：
chapters.en: That the slayer might flee thither, which should kill his neighbour unawares, and hated him not in times past; and that fleeing unto one of these cities he might live:

chapters.zh: 为流便人分定旷野平原的比悉；为迦得人分定基列的拉末；为玛拿西人分定巴珊的哥兰。
chapters.en: , Bezer in the wilderness, in the plain country, of the Reubenites; and Ramoth in Gilead, of the Gadites; and Golan in Bashan, of the Manassites.

chapters.zh: 摩西在以色列人面前所陈明的律法 ─
chapters.en: And this the law which Moses set before the children of Israel:

chapters.zh: 就是摩西在以色列人出埃及后所传给他们的法度、律例、典章；
chapters.en: These the testimonies, and the statutes, and the judgments, which Moses spake unto the children of Israel, after they came forth out of Egypt,

chapters.zh: 在约但河东伯毘珥对面的谷中，在住希实本、亚摩利王西宏之地；这西宏是摩西和以色列人出埃及后所击杀的。
chapters.en: On this side Jordan, in the valley over against Bethpeor, in the land of Sihon king of the Amorites, who dwelt at Heshbon, whom Moses and the children of Israel smote, after they were come forth out of Egypt:

chapters.zh: 他们得了他的地，又得了巴珊王噩的地，就是两个亚摩利王，在约但河东向日出之地。
chapters.en: And they possessed his land, and the land of Og king of Bashan, two kings of the Amorites, which on this side Jordan toward the sunrising;

chapters.zh: 从亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥，直到西云山，就是黑门山。
chapters.en: From Aroer, which by the bank of the river Arnon, even unto mount Sion, which Hermon,

chapters.zh: 还有约但河东的全亚拉巴，直到亚拉巴海，靠近毘斯迦山根。
chapters.en: And all the plain on this side Jordan eastward, even unto the sea of the plain, under the springs of Pisgah.

chapters.zh: 摩西将以色列众人召了来，对他们说：以色列人哪，我今日晓谕你们的律例典章，你们要听，可以学习，谨守遵行。
chapters.en: And Moses called all Israel, and said unto them, Hear, O Israel, the statutes and judgments which I speak in your ears this day, that ye may learn them, and keep, and do them.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 我们的神在何烈山与我们立约。
chapters.en: The LORD our God made a covenant with us in Horeb.

chapters.zh: 这约不是与我们列祖立的，乃是与我们今日在这里存活之人立的。
chapters.en: The LORD made not this covenant with our fathers, but with us, us, who all of us here alive this day.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在山上，从火中，面对面与你们说话 ─
chapters.en: The LORD talked with you face to face in the mount out of the midst of the fire,

chapters.zh: 那时我站在耶和华和你们中间，要将耶和华的话传给你们；因为你们惧怕那火，没有上山 ─ 说：
chapters.en: (I stood between the LORD and you at that time, to shew you the word of the LORD: for ye were afraid by reason of the fire, and went not up into the mount;) saying,

chapters.zh: 我是耶和华 ─ 你的神，曾将你从埃及地为奴之家领出来。
chapters.en: I the LORD thy God, which brought thee out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage.

chapters.zh: 除了我以外，你不可有别的神。
chapters.en: Thou shalt have none other gods before me.

chapters.zh: 不可为自己雕刻偶像，也不可做甚么形像，彷佛上天、下地和地底下、水中的百物。
chapters.en: Thou shalt not make thee graven image, any likeness that in heaven above, or that in the earth beneath, or that in the waters beneath the earth:

chapters.zh: 不可跪拜那些像，也不可事奉他，因为我耶和华 ─ 你的神是忌邪的神。恨我的，我必追讨他的罪，自父及子，直到三、四代；
chapters.en: Thou shalt not bow down thyself unto them, nor serve them: for I the LORD thy God a jealous God, visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children unto the third and fourth of them that hate me,

chapters.zh: 爱我、守我诫命的，我必向他们发慈爱，直到千代。
chapters.en: And shewing mercy unto thousands of them that love me and keep my commandments.

chapters.zh: 不可妄称耶和华 ─ 你神的名；因为妄称耶和华名的，耶和华必不以他为无罪。
chapters.en: Thou shalt not take the name of the LORD thy God in vain: for the LORD will not hold guiltless that taketh his name in vain.

chapters.zh: 当照耶和华 ─ 你神所吩咐的守安息日为圣日。
chapters.en: Keep the sabbath day to sanctify it, as the LORD thy God hath commanded thee.

chapters.zh: 六日要劳碌做你一切的工，
chapters.en: Six days thou shalt labour, and do all thy work:

chapters.zh: 但第七日是向耶和华 ─ 你神当守的安息日。这一日，你和你的儿女、仆婢、牛、驴、牲畜，并在你城里寄居的客旅，无论何工都不可做，使你的仆婢可以和你一样安息。
chapters.en: But the seventh day the sabbath of the LORD thy God: thou shalt not do any work, thou, nor thy son, nor thy daughter, nor thy manservant, nor thy maidservant, nor thine ox, nor thine ass, nor any of thy cattle, nor thy stranger that within thy gates; that thy manservant and thy maidservant may rest as well as thou.

chapters.zh: 你也要记念你在埃及地作过奴仆；耶和华 ─ 你神用大能的手和伸出来的膀臂将你从那里领出来。因此，耶和华 ─ 你的神吩咐你守安息日。
chapters.en: And remember that thou wast a servant in the land of Egypt, and the LORD thy God brought thee out thence through a mighty hand and by a stretched out arm: therefore the LORD thy God commanded thee to keep the sabbath day.

chapters.zh: 当照耶和华 ─ 你神所吩咐的孝敬父母，使你得福，并使你的日子在耶和华 ─ 你神所赐你的地上得以长久。
chapters.en: Honour thy father and thy mother, as the LORD thy God hath commanded thee; that thy days may be prolonged, and that it may go well with thee, in the land which the LORD thy God giveth thee.

chapters.zh: 不可杀人。
chapters.en: Thou shalt not kill.

chapters.zh: 不可奸淫。
chapters.en: Neither shalt thou commit adultery.

chapters.zh: 不可偷盗。
chapters.en: Neither shalt thou steal.

chapters.zh: 不可作假见证陷害人。
chapters.en: Neither shalt thou bear false witness against thy neighbour.

chapters.zh: 不可贪恋人的妻子；也不可贪图人的房屋、田地、仆婢、牛、驴，并他一切所有的。
chapters.en: Neither shalt thou desire thy neighbour's wife, neither shalt thou covet thy neighbour's house, his field, or his manservant, or his maidservant, his ox, or his ass, or any that thy neighbour's.

chapters.zh: 这些话是耶和华在山上，从火中、云中、幽暗中，大声晓谕你们全会众的；此外并没有添别的话。他就把这话写在两块石版上，交给我了。
chapters.en: These words the LORD spake unto all your assembly in the mount out of the midst of the fire, of the cloud, and of the thick darkness, with a great voice: and he added no more. And he wrote them in two tables of stone, and delivered them unto me.

chapters.zh: 那时，火焰烧山，你们听见从黑暗中出来的声音；你们支派中所有的首领和长老都来就近我，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when ye heard the voice out of the midst of the darkness, (for the mountain did burn with fire,) that ye came near unto me, all the heads of your tribes, and your elders;

chapters.zh: 说：看哪，耶和华 ─ 我们神将他的荣光和他的大能显给我们看，我们又听见他的声音从火中出来。今日我们得见神与人说话，人还存活。
chapters.en: And ye said, Behold, the LORD our God hath shewed us his glory and his greatness, and we have heard his voice out of the midst of the fire: we have seen this day that God doth talk with man, and he liveth.

chapters.zh: 现在这大火将要烧灭我们，我们何必冒死呢？若再听见耶和华 ─ 我们神的声音就必死亡。
chapters.en: Now therefore why should we die? for this great fire will consume us: if we hear the voice of the LORD our God any more, then we shall die.

chapters.zh: 凡属血气的，曾有何人听见永生神的声音从火中出来，像我们听见还能存活呢？
chapters.en: For who all flesh, that hath heard the voice of the living God speaking out of the midst of the fire, as we , and lived?

chapters.zh: 求你近前去，听耶和华 ─ 我们神所要说的一切话，将他对你说的话都传给我们，我们就听从遵行。
chapters.en: Go thou near, and hear all that the LORD our God shall say: and speak thou unto us all that the LORD our God shall speak unto thee; and we will hear , and do .

chapters.zh: 你们对我说的话，耶和华都听见了。耶和华对我说：这百姓的话，我听见了；他们所说的都是。
chapters.en: And the LORD heard the voice of your words, when ye spake unto me; and the LORD said unto me, I have heard the voice of the words of this people, which they have spoken unto thee: they have well said all that they have spoken.

chapters.zh: 惟愿他们存这样的心敬畏我，常遵守我的一切诫命，使他们和他们的子孙永远得福。
chapters.en: O that there were such an heart in them, that they would fear me, and keep all my commandments always, that it might be well with them, and with their children for ever!

chapters.zh: 你去对他们说：你们回帐棚去罢！
chapters.en: Go say to them, Get you into your tents again.

chapters.zh: 至于你，可以站在我这里，我要将一切诫命、律例、典章传给你；你要教训他们，使他们在我赐他们为业的地上遵行。
chapters.en: But as for thee, stand thou here by me, and I will speak unto thee all the commandments, and the statutes, and the judgments, which thou shalt teach them, that they may do in the land which I give them to possess it.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要照耶和华 ─ 你们神所吩咐的谨守遵行，不可偏离左右。
chapters.en: Ye shall observe to do therefore as the LORD your God hath commanded you: ye shall not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你们神所吩咐你们行的，你们都要去行，使你们可以存活得福，并使你们的日子在所要承受的地上得以长久。
chapters.en: Ye shall walk in all the ways which the LORD your God hath commanded you, that ye may live, and well with you, and ye may prolong days in the land which ye shall possess.

chapters.zh: 这是耶和华 ─ 你们神所吩咐教训你们的诫命、律例、典章，使你们在所要过去得为业的地上遵行，
chapters.en: Now these the commandments, the statutes, and the judgments, which the LORD your God commanded to teach you, that ye might do in the land whither ye go to possess it:

chapters.zh: 好叫你和你子子孙孙一生敬畏耶和华 ─ 你的神，谨守他的一切律例诫命，就是我所吩咐你的，使你的日子得以长久。
chapters.en: That thou mightest fear the LORD thy God, to keep all his statutes and his commandments, which I command thee, thou, and thy son, and thy son's son, all the days of thy life; and that thy days may be prolonged.

chapters.zh: 以色列阿，你要听，要谨守遵行，使你可以在那流奶与蜜之地得以享福，人数极其增多，正如耶和华 ─ 你列祖的神所应许你的。
chapters.en: Hear therefore, O Israel, and observe to do ; that it may be well with thee, and that ye may increase mightily, as the LORD God of thy fathers hath promised thee, in the land that floweth with milk and honey.

chapters.zh: 以色列阿，你要听！耶和华 ─ 我们神是独一的主。
chapters.en: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God one LORD:

chapters.zh: 你要尽心、尽性、尽力爱耶和华 ─ 你的神。
chapters.en: And thou shalt love the LORD thy God with all thine heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy might.

chapters.zh: 我今日所吩咐你的话都要记在心上，
chapters.en: And these words, which I command thee this day, shall be in thine heart:

chapters.zh: 也要殷勤教训你的儿女。无论你坐在家里，行在路上，躺下，起来，都要谈论。
chapters.en: And thou shalt teach them diligently unto thy children, and shalt talk of them when thou sittest in thine house, and when thou walkest by the way, and when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.

chapters.zh: 也要系在手上为记号，戴在额上为经文；
chapters.en: And thou shalt bind them for a sign upon thine hand, and they shall be as frontlets between thine eyes.

chapters.zh: 又要写在你房屋的门框上，并你的城门上。
chapters.en: And thou shalt write them upon the posts of thy house, and on thy gates.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你的神领你进他向你列祖亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓应许给你的地。那里有城邑，又大又美，非你所建造的；
chapters.en: And it shall be, when the LORD thy God shall have brought thee into the land which he sware unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give thee great and goodly cities, which thou buildedst not,

chapters.zh: 有房屋，装满各样美物，非你所装满的；有凿成的水井，非你所凿成的；还有葡萄园、橄榄园，非你所栽种的；你吃了而且饱足。
chapters.en: And houses full of all good , which thou filledst not, and wells digged, which thou diggedst not, vineyards and olive trees, which thou plantedst not; when thou shalt have eaten and be full;

chapters.zh: 那时你要谨慎，免得你忘记将你从埃及地、为奴之家领出来的耶和华。
chapters.en: beware lest thou forget the LORD, which brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage.

chapters.zh: 你要敬畏耶和华 ─ 你的神，事奉他，指著他的名起誓。
chapters.en: Thou shalt fear the LORD thy God, and serve him, and shalt swear by his name.

chapters.zh: 不可随从别神，就是你们四围国民的神；
chapters.en: Ye shall not go after other gods, of the gods of the people which round about you;

chapters.zh: 因为在你们中间的耶和华 ─ 你神是忌邪的神，惟恐耶和华 ─ 你神的怒气向你发作，就把你从地上除灭。
chapters.en: (For the LORD thy God a jealous God among you) lest the anger of the LORD thy God be kindled against thee, and destroy thee from off the face of the earth.

chapters.zh: 你们不可试探耶和华 ─ 你们的神，像你们在玛撒那样试探他。
chapters.en: Ye shall not tempt the LORD your God, as ye tempted in Massah.

chapters.zh: 要留意遵守耶和华 ─ 你们神所吩咐的诫命、法度、律例。
chapters.en: Ye shall diligently keep the commandments of the LORD your God, and his testimonies, and his statutes, which he hath commanded thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华眼中看为正、看为善的，你都要遵行，使你可以享福，并可以进去得耶和华向你列祖起誓应许的那美地，
chapters.en: And thou shalt do right and good in the sight of the LORD: that it may be well with thee, and that thou mayest go in and possess the good land which the LORD sware unto thy fathers,

chapters.zh: 照耶和华所说的，从你面前撵出你的一切仇敌。
chapters.en: To cast out all thine enemies from before thee, as the LORD hath spoken.

chapters.zh: 日后，你的儿子问你说：耶和华 ─ 我们神吩咐你们的这些法度、律例、典章是甚么意思呢？
chapters.en: when thy son asketh thee in time to come, saying, What the testimonies, and the statutes, and the judgments, which the LORD our God hath commanded you?

chapters.zh: 你就告诉你的儿子说：我们在埃及作过法老的奴仆；耶和华用大能的手将我们从埃及领出来，
chapters.en: Then thou shalt say unto thy son, We were Pharaoh's bondmen in Egypt; and the LORD brought us out of Egypt with a mighty hand:

chapters.zh: 在我们眼前，将重大可怕的神迹奇事施行在埃及地和法老并他全家的身上，
chapters.en: And the LORD shewed signs and wonders, great and sore, upon Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his household, before our eyes:

chapters.zh: 将我们从那里领出来，要领我们进入他向我们列祖起誓应许之地，把这地赐给我们。
chapters.en: And he brought us out from thence, that he might bring us in, to give us the land which he sware unto our fathers.

chapters.zh: 耶和华又吩咐我们遵行这一切律例，要敬畏耶和华 ─ 我们的神，使我们常得好处，蒙他保全我们的生命，像今日一样。
chapters.en: And the LORD commanded us to do all these statutes, to fear the LORD our God, for our good always, that he might preserve us alive, as at this day.

chapters.zh: 我们若照耶和华 ─ 我们神所吩咐的一切诫命谨守遵行，这就是我们的义了。
chapters.en: And it shall be our righteousness, if we observe to do all these commandments before the LORD our God, as he hath commanded us.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神领你进入要得为业之地，从你面前赶出许多国民，就是赫人、革迦撒人、亚摩利人、迦南人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人，共七国的民，都比你强大。
chapters.en: When the LORD thy God shall bring thee into the land whither thou goest to possess it, and hath cast out many nations before thee, the Hittites, and the Girgashites, and the Amorites, and the Canaanites, and the Perizzites, and the Hivites, and the Jebusites, seven nations greater and mightier than thou;

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神将他们交给你击杀，那时你要把他们灭绝净尽，不可与他们立约，也不可怜恤他们。
chapters.en: And when the LORD thy God shall deliver them before thee; thou shalt smite them, utterly destroy them; thou shalt make no covenant with them, nor shew mercy unto them:

chapters.zh: 不可与他们结亲。不可将你的女儿嫁他们的儿子，也不可叫你的儿子娶他们的女儿；
chapters.en: Neither shalt thou make marriages with them; thy daughter thou shalt not give unto his son, nor his daughter shalt thou take unto thy son.

chapters.zh: 因为他必使你儿子转离不跟从主，去事奉别神，以致耶和华的怒气向你们发作，就速速地将你们灭绝。
chapters.en: For they will turn away thy son from following me, that they may serve other gods: so will the anger of the LORD be kindled against you, and destroy thee suddenly.

chapters.zh: 你们却要这样待他们：拆毁他们的祭坛，打碎他们的柱像，砍下他们的木偶，用火焚烧他们雕刻的偶像。
chapters.en: But thus shall ye deal with them; ye shall destroy their altars, and break down their images, and cut down their groves, and burn their graven images with fire.

chapters.zh: 因为你归耶和华 ─ 你神为圣洁的民；耶和华 ─ 你神从地上的万民中拣选你，特作自己的子民。
chapters.en: For thou an holy people unto the LORD thy God: the LORD thy God hath chosen thee to be a special people unto himself, above all people that upon the face of the earth.

chapters.zh: 耶和华专爱你们，拣选你们，并非因你们的人数多于别民，原来你们的人数在万民中是最少的。
chapters.en: The LORD did not set his love upon you, nor choose you, because ye were more in number than any people; for ye the fewest of all people:

chapters.zh: 只因耶和华爱你们，又因要守他向你们列祖所起的誓，就用大能的手领你们出来，从为奴之家救赎你们脱离埃及王法老的手。
chapters.en: But because the LORD loved you, and because he would keep the oath which he had sworn unto your fathers, hath the LORD brought you out with a mighty hand, and redeemed you out of the house of bondmen, from the hand of Pharaoh king of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 所以，你要知道耶和华 ─ 你的神，他是神，是信实的神；向爱他、守他诫命的人守约，施慈爱，直到千代；
chapters.en: Know therefore that the LORD thy God, he God, the faithful God, which keepeth covenant and mercy with them that love him and keep his commandments to a thousand generations;

chapters.zh: 向恨他的人当面报应他们，将他们灭绝。凡恨他的人必报应他们，决不迟延。
chapters.en: And repayeth them that hate him to their face, to destroy them: he will not be slack to him that hateth him, he will repay him to his face.

chapters.zh: 所以，你要谨守遵行我今日所吩咐你的诫命、律例、典章。
chapters.en: Thou shalt therefore keep the commandments, and the statutes, and the judgments, which I command thee this day, to do them.

chapters.zh: 你们果然听从这些典章，谨守遵行，耶和华 ─ 你神就必照他向你列祖所起的誓守约，施慈爱。
chapters.en: Wherefore it shall come to pass, if ye hearken to these judgments, and keep, and do them, that the LORD thy God shall keep unto thee the covenant and the mercy which he sware unto thy fathers:

chapters.zh: 他必爱你，赐福与你，使你人数增多，也必在他向你列祖起誓应许给你的地上赐福与你身所生的，地所产的，并你的五谷、新酒，和油，以及牛犊、羊羔。
chapters.en: And he will love thee, and bless thee, and multiply thee: he will also bless the fruit of thy womb, and the fruit of thy land, thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil, the increase of thy kine, and the flocks of thy sheep, in the land which he sware unto thy fathers to give thee.

chapters.zh: 你必蒙福胜过万民；你们的男女没有不能生养的，牲畜也没有不能生育的。
chapters.en: Thou shalt be blessed above all people: there shall not be male or female barren among you, or among your cattle.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必使一切的病症离开你；你所知道埃及各样的恶疾，他不加在你身上，只加在一切恨你的人身上。
chapters.en: And the LORD will take away from thee all sickness, and will put none of the evil diseases of Egypt, which thou knowest, upon thee; but will lay them upon all that hate thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神所要交给你的一切人民，你要将他们除灭；你眼不可顾惜他们。你也不可事奉他们的神，因这必成为你的网罗。
chapters.en: And thou shalt consume all the people which the LORD thy God shall deliver thee; thine eye shall have no pity upon them: neither shalt thou serve their gods; for that a snare unto thee.

chapters.zh: 你若心里说，这些国的民比我更多，我怎能赶出他们呢？
chapters.en: If thou shalt say in thine heart, These nations more than I; how can I dispossess them?

chapters.zh: 你不要惧怕他们，要牢牢记念耶和华 ─ 你神向法老和埃及全地所行的事，
chapters.en: Thou shalt not be afraid of them: shalt well remember what the LORD thy God did unto Pharaoh, and unto all Egypt;

chapters.zh: 就是你亲眼所看见的大试验、神迹、奇事，和大能的手，并伸出来的膀臂，都是耶和华 ─ 你神领你出来所用的。耶和华 ─ 你神必照样待你所惧怕的一切人民。
chapters.en: The great temptations which thine eyes saw, and the signs, and the wonders, and the mighty hand, and the stretched out arm, whereby the LORD thy God brought thee out: so shall the LORD thy God do unto all the people of whom thou art afraid.

chapters.zh: 并且耶和华 ─ 你神必打发黄蜂飞到他们中间，直到那剩下而藏躲的人从你面前灭亡。
chapters.en: Moreover the LORD thy God will send the hornet among them, until they that are left, and hide themselves from thee, be destroyed.

chapters.zh: 你不要因他们惊恐，因为耶和华 ─ 你神在你们中间是大而可畏的神。
chapters.en: Thou shalt not be affrighted at them: for the LORD thy God among you, a mighty God and terrible.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神必将这些国的民从你面前渐渐赶出；你不可把他们速速灭尽，恐怕野地的兽多起来害你。
chapters.en: And the LORD thy God will put out those nations before thee by little and little: thou mayest not consume them at once, lest the beasts of the field increase upon thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神必将他们交给你，大大的扰乱他们，直到他们灭绝了；
chapters.en: But the LORD thy God shall deliver them unto thee, and shall destroy them with a mighty destruction, until they be destroyed.

chapters.zh: 又要将他们的君王交在你手中，你就使他们的名从天下消灭。必无一人能在你面前站立得住，直到你将他们灭绝了。
chapters.en: And he shall deliver their kings into thine hand, and thou shalt destroy their name from under heaven: there shall no man be able to stand before thee, until thou have destroyed them.

chapters.zh: 他们雕刻的神像，你们要用火焚烧；其上的金银，你不可贪图，也不可收取，免得你因此陷入网罗；这原是耶和华 ─ 你神所憎恶的。
chapters.en: The graven images of their gods shall ye burn with fire: thou shalt not desire the silver or gold on them, nor take unto thee, lest thou be snared therein: for it an abomination to the LORD thy God.

chapters.zh: 可憎的物，你不可带进家去；不然，你就成了当毁灭的，与那物一样。你要十分厌恶，十分憎嫌，因为这是当毁灭的物。
chapters.en: Neither shalt thou bring an abomination into thine house, lest thou be a cursed thing like it: thou shalt utterly detest it, and thou shalt utterly abhor it; for it a cursed thing.

chapters.zh: 我今日所吩咐的一切诫命，你们要谨守遵行，好叫你们存活，人数增多，且进去得耶和华向你们列祖起誓应许的那地。
chapters.en: All the commandments which I command thee this day shall ye observe to do, that ye may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which the LORD sware unto your fathers.

chapters.zh: 你也要记念耶和华 ─ 你的神在旷野引导你这四十年，是要苦炼你，试验你，要知道你心内如何，肯守他的诫命不肯。
chapters.en: And thou shalt remember all the way which the LORD thy God led thee these forty years in the wilderness, to humble thee, to prove thee, to know what in thine heart, whether thou wouldest keep his commandments, or no.

chapters.zh: 他苦炼你，任你饥饿，将你和你列祖所不认识的吗哪赐给你吃，使你知道，人活著不是单靠食物，乃是靠耶和华口里所出的一切话。
chapters.en: And he humbled thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every that proceedeth out of the mouth of the LORD doth man live.

chapters.zh: 这四十年，你的衣服没有穿破，你的脚也没有肿。
chapters.en: Thy raiment waxed not old upon thee, neither did thy foot swell, these forty years.

chapters.zh: 你当心里思想，耶和华 ─ 你神管教你，好像人管教儿子一样。
chapters.en: Thou shalt also consider in thine heart, that, as a man chasteneth his son, the LORD thy God chasteneth thee.

chapters.zh: 你要谨守耶和华 ─ 你神的诫命，遵行他的道，敬畏他。
chapters.en: Therefore thou shalt keep the commandments of the LORD thy God, to walk in his ways, and to fear him.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华 ─ 你神领你进入美地，那地有河，有泉，有源，从山谷中流出水来。
chapters.en: For the LORD thy God bringeth thee into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and depths that spring out of valleys and hills;

chapters.zh: 那地有小麦、大麦、葡萄树、无花果树、石榴树、橄榄树，和蜜。
chapters.en: A land of wheat, and barley, and vines, and fig trees, and pomegranates; a land of oil olive, and honey;

chapters.zh: 你在那地不缺食物，一无所缺。那地的石头是铁，山内可以挖铜。
chapters.en: A land wherein thou shalt eat bread without scarceness, thou shalt not lack any in it; a land whose stones iron, and out of whose hills thou mayest dig brass.

chapters.zh: 你吃得饱足，就要称颂耶和华 ─ 你的神，因他将那美地赐给你了。
chapters.en: When thou hast eaten and art full, then thou shalt bless the LORD thy God for the good land which he hath given thee.

chapters.zh: 你要谨慎，免得忘记耶和华 ─ 你的神，不守他的诫命、典章、律例，就是我今日所吩咐你的；
chapters.en: Beware that thou forget not the LORD thy God, in not keeping his commandments, and his judgments, and his statutes, which I command thee this day:

chapters.zh: 恐怕你吃得饱足，建造美好的房屋居住，
chapters.en: Lest thou hast eaten and art full, and hast built goodly houses, and dwelt ;

chapters.zh: 你的牛羊加多，你的金银增添，并你所有的全都加增，
chapters.en: And thy herds and thy flocks multiply, and thy silver and thy gold is multiplied, and all that thou hast is multiplied;

chapters.zh: 你就心高气傲，忘记耶和华 ─ 你的神，就是将你从埃及地为奴之家领出来的，
chapters.en: Then thine heart be lifted up, and thou forget the LORD thy God, which brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage;

chapters.zh: 引你经过那大而可怕的旷野，那里有火蛇、蝎子、干旱无水之地。他曾为你使水从坚硬的磐石中流出来，
chapters.en: Who led thee through that great and terrible wilderness, fiery serpents, and scorpions, and drought, where no water; who brought thee forth water out of the rock of flint;

chapters.zh: 又在旷野将你列祖所不认识的吗哪赐给你吃，是要苦炼你，试验你，叫你终久享福；
chapters.en: Who fed thee in the wilderness with manna, which thy fathers knew not, that he might humble thee, and that he might prove thee, to do thee good at thy latter end;

chapters.zh: 恐怕你心里说：这货财是我力量、我能力得来的。
chapters.en: And thou say in thine heart, My power and the might of hand hath gotten me this wealth.

chapters.zh: 你要记念耶和华 ─ 你的神，因为得货财的力量是他给你的，为要坚定他向你列祖起誓所立的约，像今日一样。
chapters.en: But thou shalt remember the LORD thy God: for he that giveth thee power to get wealth, that he may establish his covenant which he sware unto thy fathers, as this day.

chapters.zh: 你若忘记耶和华 ─ 你的神，随从别神，事奉敬拜，你们必定灭亡；这是我今日警戒你们的。
chapters.en: And it shall be, if thou do at all forget the LORD thy God, and walk after other gods, and serve them, and worship them, I testify against you this day that ye shall surely perish.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在你们面前怎样使列国的民灭亡，你们也必照样灭亡，因为你们不听从耶和华 ─ 你们神的话。
chapters.en: As the nations which the LORD destroyeth before your face, so shall ye perish; because ye would not be obedient unto the voice of the LORD your God.

chapters.zh: 以色列阿，你当听！你今日要过约但河，进去赶出比你强大的国民，得著广大坚固、高得顶天的城邑。
chapters.en: Hear, O Israel: Thou to pass over Jordan this day, to go in to possess nations greater and mightier than thyself, cities great and fenced up to heaven,

chapters.zh: 那民是亚衲族的人，又大又高，是你所知道的；也曾听见有人指著他们说：谁能在亚衲族人面前站立得住呢？
chapters.en: A people great and tall, the children of the Anakims, whom thou knowest, and thou hast heard , Who can stand before the children of Anak!

chapters.zh: 你今日当知道，耶和华 ─ 你的神在你前面过去，如同烈火，要灭绝他们，将他们制伏在你面前。这样，你就要照耶和华所说的赶出他们，使他们速速灭亡。
chapters.en: Understand therefore this day, that the LORD thy God he which goeth over before thee; a consuming fire he shall destroy them, and he shall bring them down before thy face: so shalt thou drive them out, and destroy them quickly, as the LORD hath said unto thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你的神将这些国民从你面前撵出以后，你心里不可说：耶和华将我领进来得这地是因我的义。其实，耶和华将他们从你面前赶出去是因他们的恶。
chapters.en: Speak not thou in thine heart, after that the LORD thy God hath cast them out from before thee, saying, For my righteousness the LORD hath brought me in to possess this land: but for the wickedness of these nations the LORD doth drive them out from before thee.

chapters.zh: 你进去得他们的地，并不是因你的义，也不是因你心里正直，乃是因这些国民的恶，耶和华 ─ 你的神将他们从你面前赶出去，又因耶和华要坚定他向你列祖亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓所应许的话。
chapters.en: Not for thy righteousness, or for the uprightness of thine heart, dost thou go to possess their land: but for the wickedness of these nations the LORD thy God doth drive them out from before thee, and that he may perform the word which the LORD sware unto thy fathers, Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.

chapters.zh: 你当知道，耶和华 ─ 你神将这美地赐你为业，并不是因你的义；你本是硬著颈项的百姓。
chapters.en: Understand therefore, that the LORD thy God giveth thee not this good land to possess it for thy righteousness; for thou a stiffnecked people.

chapters.zh: 你当记念不忘，你在旷野怎样惹耶和华 ─ 你神发怒。自从你出了埃及地的那日，直到你们来到这地方，你们时常悖逆耶和华。
chapters.en: Remember, forget not, how thou provokedst the LORD thy God to wrath in the wilderness: from the day that thou didst depart out of the land of Egypt, until ye came unto this place, ye have been rebellious against the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们在何烈山又惹耶和华发怒；他恼怒你们，要灭绝你们。
chapters.en: Also in Horeb ye provoked the LORD to wrath, so that the LORD was angry with you to have destroyed you.

chapters.zh: 我上了山，要领受两块石版，就是耶和华与你们立约的版。那时我在山上住了四十昼夜，没有吃饭，也没有喝水。
chapters.en: When I was gone up into the mount to receive the tables of stone, the tables of the covenant which the LORD made with you, then I abode in the mount forty days and forty nights, I neither did eat bread nor drink water:

chapters.zh: 耶和华把那两块石版交给我，是神用指头写的。版上所写的是照耶和华在大会的日子、在山上、从火中对你们所说的一切话。
chapters.en: And the LORD delivered unto me two tables of stone written with the finger of God; and on them according to all the words, which the LORD spake with you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly.

chapters.zh: 过了四十昼夜，耶和华把那两块石版，就是约版，交给我。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the end of forty days and forty nights, the LORD gave me the two tables of stone, the tables of the covenant.

chapters.zh: 对我说：你起来，赶快下去！因为你从埃及领出来的百姓已经败坏了自己；他们快快的偏离了我所吩咐的道，为自己铸成了偶像。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto me, Arise, get thee down quickly from hence; for thy people which thou hast brought forth out of Egypt have corrupted ; they are quickly turned aside out of the way which I commanded them; they have made them a molten image.

chapters.zh: 耶和华又对我说：我看这百姓是硬著颈项的百姓。
chapters.en: Furthermore the LORD spake unto me, saying, I have seen this people, and, behold, it a stiffnecked people:

chapters.zh: 你且由著我，我要灭绝他们，将他们的名从天下涂抹，使你的后裔比他们成为更大更强的国。
chapters.en: Let me alone, that I may destroy them, and blot out their name from under heaven: and I will make of thee a nation mightier and greater than they.

chapters.zh: 于是我转身下山，山被火烧著，两块约版在我两手之中。
chapters.en: So I turned and came down from the mount, and the mount burned with fire: and the two tables of the covenant in my two hands.

chapters.zh: 我一看见你们得罪了耶和华 ─ 你们的神，铸成了牛犊，快快的偏离了耶和华所吩咐你们的道，
chapters.en: And I looked, and, behold, ye had sinned against the LORD your God, had made you a molten calf: ye had turned aside quickly out of the way which the LORD had commanded you.

chapters.zh: 我就把那两块版从我手中扔下去，在你们眼前摔碎了。
chapters.en: And I took the two tables, and cast them out of my two hands, and brake them before your eyes.

chapters.zh: 因你们所犯的一切罪，行了耶和华眼中看为恶的事，惹他发怒，我就像从前俯伏在耶和华面前四十昼夜，没有吃饭，也没有喝水。
chapters.en: And I fell down before the LORD, as at the first, forty days and forty nights: I did neither eat bread, nor drink water, because of all your sins which ye sinned, in doing wickedly in the sight of the LORD, to provoke him to anger.

chapters.zh: 我因耶和华向你们大发烈怒，要灭绝你们，就甚害怕；但那次耶和华又应允了我。
chapters.en: For I was afraid of the anger and hot displeasure, wherewith the LORD was wroth against you to destroy you. But the LORD hearkened unto me at that time also.

chapters.zh: 耶和华也向亚伦甚是发怒，要灭绝他；那时我又为亚伦祈祷。
chapters.en: And the LORD was very angry with Aaron to have destroyed him: and I prayed for Aaron also the same time.

chapters.zh: 我把那叫你们犯罪所铸的牛犊用火焚烧，又捣碎磨得很细，以至细如灰尘，我就把这灰尘撒在从山上流下来的溪水中。
chapters.en: And I took your sin, the calf which ye had made, and burnt it with fire, and stamped it, ground very small, until it was as small as dust: and I cast the dust thereof into the brook that descended out of the mount.

chapters.zh: 你们在他备拉、玛撒、基博罗哈他瓦又惹耶和华发怒。
chapters.en: And at Taberah, and at Massah, and at Kibrothhattaavah, ye provoked the LORD to wrath.

chapters.zh: 耶和华打发你们离开加低斯巴尼亚，说：你们上去得我所赐给你们的地。那时你们违背了耶和华 ─ 你们神的命令，不信服他，不听从他的话。
chapters.en: Likewise when the LORD sent you from Kadeshbarnea, saying, Go up and possess the land which I have given you; then ye rebelled against the commandment of the LORD your God, and ye believed him not, nor hearkened to his voice.

chapters.zh: 自从我认识你们以来，你们常常悖逆耶和华。
chapters.en: Ye have been rebellious against the LORD from the day that I knew you.

chapters.zh: 我因耶和华说要灭绝你们，就在耶和华面前照旧俯伏四十昼夜。
chapters.en: Thus I fell down before the LORD forty days and forty nights, as I fell down ; because the LORD had said he would destroy you.

chapters.zh: 我祈祷耶和华说：主耶和华阿，求你不要灭绝你的百姓。他们是你的产业，是你用大力救赎的，用大能从埃及领出来的。
chapters.en: I prayed therefore unto the LORD, and said, O Lord GOD, destroy not thy people and thine inheritance, which thou hast redeemed through thy greatness, which thou hast brought forth out of Egypt with a mighty hand.

chapters.zh: 求你记念你的仆人亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各，不要想念这百姓的顽梗、邪恶、罪过，
chapters.en: Remember thy servants, Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob; look not unto the stubbornness of this people, nor to their wickedness, nor to their sin:

chapters.zh: 免得你领我们出来的那地之人说，耶和华因为不能将这百姓领进他所应许之地，又因恨他们，所以领他们出去，要在旷野杀他们。
chapters.en: Lest the land whence thou broughtest us out say, Because the LORD was not able to bring them into the land which he promised them, and because he hated them, he hath brought them out to slay them in the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 其实他们是你的百姓，你的产业，是你用大能和伸出来的膀臂领出来的。
chapters.en: Yet they thy people and thine inheritance, which thou broughtest out by thy mighty power and by thy stretched out arm.

chapters.zh: 那时，耶和华吩咐我说：你要凿出两块石版，和先前的一样，上山到我这里来，又要做一木柜。
chapters.en: At that time the LORD said unto me, Hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first, and come up unto me into the mount, and make thee an ark of wood.

chapters.zh: 你先前摔碎的那版，其上的字我要写在这版上；你要将这版放在柜中。
chapters.en: And I will write on the tables the words that were in the first tables which thou brakest, and thou shalt put them in the ark.

chapters.zh: 于是我用皂荚木做了一柜，又凿出两块石版，和先前的一样，手里拿这两块版上山去了。
chapters.en: And I made an ark shittim wood, and hewed two tables of stone like unto the first, and went up into the mount, having the two tables in mine hand.

chapters.zh: 耶和华将那大会之日、在山上从火中所传与你们的十条诫，照先前所写的，写在这版上，将版交给我了。
chapters.en: And he wrote on the tables, according to the first writing, the ten commandments, which the LORD spake unto you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly: and the LORD gave them unto me.

chapters.zh: 我转身下山，将这版放在我所做的柜中，现今还在那里，正如耶和华所吩咐我的。
chapters.en: And I turned myself and came down from the mount, and put the tables in the ark which I had made; and there they be, as the LORD commanded me.

chapters.zh: （以色列人从比罗比尼亚干（或作：亚干井）起行，到了摩西拉。亚伦死在那里，就葬在那里。他儿子以利亚撒接续他供祭司的职分。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel took their journey from Beeroth of the children of Jaakan to Mosera: there Aaron died, and there he was buried; and Eleazar his son ministered in the priest's office in his stead.

chapters.zh: 他们从那里起行，到了谷歌大，又从谷歌大到了有溪水之地的约巴他。
chapters.en: From thence they journeyed unto Gudgodah; and from Gudgodah to Jotbath, a land of rivers of waters.

chapters.zh: 那时，耶和华将利未支派分别出来，抬耶和华的约柜，又侍立在耶和华面前事奉他，奉他的名祝福，直到今日。
chapters.en: At that time the LORD separated the tribe of Levi, to bear the ark of the covenant of the LORD, to stand before the LORD to minister unto him, and to bless in his name, unto this day.

chapters.zh: 所以利未人在他弟兄中无分无业，耶和华是他的产业，正如耶和华 ─ 你神所应许他的。）
chapters.en: Wherefore Levi hath no part nor inheritance with his brethren; the LORD his inheritance, according as the LORD thy God promised him.

chapters.zh: 我又像从前在山上住了四十昼夜。那次耶和华也应允我，不忍将你灭绝。
chapters.en: And I stayed in the mount, according to the first time, forty days and forty nights; and the LORD hearkened unto me at that time also, the LORD would not destroy thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华吩咐我说：你起来引导这百姓，使他们进去得我向他们列祖起誓应许所赐之地。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto me, Arise, take journey before the people, that they may go in and possess the land, which I sware unto their fathers to give unto them.

chapters.zh: 以色列阿，现在耶和华 ─ 你神向你所要的是甚么呢？只要你敬畏耶和华 ─ 你的神，遵行他的道，爱他，尽心尽性事奉他，
chapters.en: And now, Israel, what doth the LORD thy God require of thee, but to fear the LORD thy God, to walk in all his ways, and to love him, and to serve the LORD thy God with all thy heart and with all thy soul,

chapters.zh: 遵守他的诫命律例，就是我今日所吩咐你的，为要叫你得福。
chapters.en: To keep the commandments of the LORD, and his statutes, which I command thee this day for thy good?

chapters.zh: 看哪，天和天上的天，地和地上所有的，都属耶和华 ─ 你的神。
chapters.en: Behold, the heaven and the heaven of heavens the LORD'S thy God, the earth , with all that therein .

chapters.zh: 耶和华但喜悦你的列祖，爱他们，从万民中拣选他们的后裔，就是你们，像今日一样。
chapters.en: Only the LORD had a delight in thy fathers to love them, and he chose their seed after them, you above all people, as this day.

chapters.zh: 所以你们要将心里的污秽除掉，不可再硬著颈项。
chapters.en: Circumcise therefore the foreskin of your heart, and be no more stiffnecked.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华 ─ 你们的神 ─ 他是万神之神，万主之主，至大的神，大有能力，大而可畏，不以貌取人，也不受贿赂。
chapters.en: For the LORD your God God of gods, and Lord of lords, a great God, a mighty, and a terrible, which regardeth not persons, nor taketh reward:

chapters.zh: 他为孤儿寡妇伸冤，又怜爱寄居的，赐给他衣食。
chapters.en: He doth execute the judgment of the fatherless and widow, and loveth the stranger, in giving him food and raiment.

chapters.zh: 所以你们要怜爱寄居的，因为你们在埃及地也作过寄居的。
chapters.en: Love ye therefore the stranger: for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 你要敬畏耶和华 ─ 你的神，事奉他，专靠他，也要指著他的名起誓。
chapters.en: Thou shalt fear the LORD thy God; him shalt thou serve, and to him shalt thou cleave, and swear by his name.

chapters.zh: 他是你所赞美的，是你的神，为你做了那大而可畏的事，是你亲眼所看见的。
chapters.en: He thy praise, and he thy God, that hath done for thee these great and terrible things, which thine eyes have seen.

chapters.zh: 你的列祖七十人下埃及；现在耶和华 ─ 你的神使你如同天上的星那样多。
chapters.en: Thy fathers went down into Egypt with threescore and ten persons; and now the LORD thy God hath made thee as the stars of heaven for multitude.

chapters.zh: 你要爱耶和华 ─ 你的神，常守他的吩咐、律例、典章、诫命。
chapters.en: Therefore thou shalt love the LORD thy God, and keep his charge, and his statutes, and his judgments, and his commandments, alway.

chapters.zh: 你们今日当知道，我本不是和你们的儿女说话；因为他们不知道，也没有看见耶和华 ─ 你们神的管教、威严、大能的手，和伸出来的膀臂，
chapters.en: And know ye this day: for not with your children which have not known, and which have not seen the chastisement of the LORD your God, his greatness, his mighty hand, and his stretched out arm,

chapters.zh: 并他在埃及中向埃及王法老和其全地所行的神迹奇事；
chapters.en: And his miracles, and his acts, which he did in the midst of Egypt unto Pharaoh the king of Egypt, and unto all his land;

chapters.zh: 也没有看见他怎样待埃及的军兵、车马，他们追赶你们的时候，耶和华怎样使红海的水淹没他们，将他们灭绝，直到今日，
chapters.en: And what he did unto the army of Egypt, unto their horses, and to their chariots; how he made the water of the Red sea to overflow them as they pursued after you, and the LORD hath destroyed them unto this day;

chapters.zh: 并他在旷野怎样待你们，以至你们来到这地方；
chapters.en: And what he did unto you in the wilderness, until ye came into this place;

chapters.zh: 也没有看见他怎样待流便子孙以利押的儿子大坍、亚比兰，地怎样在以色列人中间开口，吞了他们和他们的家眷，并帐棚与跟他们的一切活物。
chapters.en: And what he did unto Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, the son of Reuben: how the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up, and their households, and their tents, and all the substance that in their possession, in the midst of all Israel:

chapters.zh: 惟有你们亲眼看见耶和华所做的一切大事。
chapters.en: But your eyes have seen all the great acts of the LORD which he did.

chapters.zh: 所以，你们要守我今日所吩咐的一切诫命，使你们胆壮，能以进去，得你们所要得的那地，
chapters.en: Therefore shall ye keep all the commandments which I command you this day, that ye may be strong, and go in and possess the land, whither ye go to possess it;

chapters.zh: 并使你们的日子在耶和华向你们列祖起誓、应许给他们和他们后裔的地上得以长久；那是流奶与蜜之地。
chapters.en: And that ye may prolong days in the land, which the LORD sware unto your fathers to give unto them and to their seed, a land that floweth with milk and honey.

chapters.zh: 你要进去得为业的那地，本不像你出来的埃及地。你在那里撒种，用脚浇灌，像浇灌菜园一样。
chapters.en: For the land, whither thou goest in to possess it, not as the land of Egypt, from whence ye came out, where thou sowedst thy seed, and wateredst with thy foot, as a garden of herbs:

chapters.zh: 你们要过去得为业的那地乃是有山有谷、雨水滋润之地，
chapters.en: But the land, whither ye go to possess it, a land of hills and valleys, drinketh water of the rain of heaven:

chapters.zh: 是耶和华 ─ 你神所眷顾的；从岁首到年终，耶和华 ─ 你神的眼目时常看顾那地。
chapters.en: A land which the LORD thy God careth for: the eyes of the LORD thy God always upon it, from the beginning of the year even unto the end of the year.

chapters.zh: 你们若留意听从我今日所吩咐的诫命，爱耶和华 ─ 你们的神，尽心尽性事奉他，
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, if ye shall hearken diligently unto my commandments which I command you this day, to love the LORD your God, and to serve him with all your heart and with all your soul,

chapters.zh: 他（原文是我）必按时降秋雨春雨在你们的地上，使你们可以收藏五谷、新酒和油，
chapters.en: That I will give the rain of your land in his due season, the first rain and the latter rain, that thou mayest gather in thy corn, and thy wine, and thine oil.

chapters.zh: 也必使你吃得饱足，并使田野为你的牲畜长草。
chapters.en: And I will send grass in thy fields for thy cattle, that thou mayest eat and be full.

chapters.zh: 你们要谨慎，免得心中受迷惑，就偏离正路，去事奉敬拜别神。
chapters.en: Take heed to yourselves, that your heart be not deceived, and ye turn aside, and serve other gods, and worship them;

chapters.zh: 耶和华的怒气向你们发作，就使天闭塞不下雨，地也不出产，使你们在耶和华所赐给你们的美地上速速灭亡。
chapters.en: And the LORD'S wrath be kindled against you, and he shut up the heaven, that there be no rain, and that the land yield not her fruit; and ye perish quickly from off the good land which the LORD giveth you.

chapters.zh: 你们要将我这话存在心内，留在意中，系在手上为记号，戴在额上为经文；
chapters.en: Therefore shall ye lay up these my words in your heart and in your soul, and bind them for a sign upon your hand, that they may be as frontlets between your eyes.

chapters.zh: 也要教训你们的儿女，无论坐在家里，行在路上，躺下，起来，都要谈论；
chapters.en: And ye shall teach them your children, speaking of them when thou sittest in thine house, and when thou walkest by the way, when thou liest down, and when thou risest up.

chapters.zh: 又要写在房屋的门框上，并城门上，
chapters.en: And thou shalt write them upon the door posts of thine house, and upon thy gates:

chapters.zh: 使你们和你们子孙的日子在耶和华向你们列祖起誓、应许给他们的地上得以增多，如天覆地的日子那样多。
chapters.en: That your days may be multiplied, and the days of your children, in the land which the LORD sware unto your fathers to give them, as the days of heaven upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 你们若留意谨守遵行我所吩咐这一切的诫命，爱耶和华 ─ 你们的神，行他的道，专靠他，
chapters.en: For if ye shall diligently keep all these commandments which I command you, to do them, to love the LORD your God, to walk in all his ways, and to cleave unto him;

chapters.zh: 他必从你们面前赶出这一切国民，就是比你们更大更强的国民，你们也要得他们的地。
chapters.en: Then will the LORD drive out all these nations from before you, and ye shall possess greater nations and mightier than yourselves.

chapters.zh: 凡你们脚掌所踏之地都必归你们；从旷野和利巴嫩，并伯拉大河，直到西海，都要作你们的境界。
chapters.en: Every place whereon the soles of your feet shall tread shall be yours: from the wilderness and Lebanon, from the river, the river Euphrates, even unto the uttermost sea shall your coast be.

chapters.zh: 必无一人能在你们面前站立得住；耶和华 ─ 你们的神必照他所说的，使惧怕惊恐临到你们所踏之地的居民。
chapters.en: There shall no man be able to stand before you: the LORD your God shall lay the fear of you and the dread of you upon all the land that ye shall tread upon, as he hath said unto you.

chapters.zh: 看哪，我今日将祝福与咒诅的话都陈明在你们面前。
chapters.en: Behold, I set before you this day a blessing and a curse;

chapters.zh: 你们若听从耶和华 ─ 你们神的诫命，就是我今日所吩咐你们的，就必蒙福。
chapters.en: A blessing, if ye obey the commandments of the LORD your God, which I command you this day:

chapters.zh: 你们若不听从耶和华 ─ 你们神的诫命，偏离我今日所吩咐你们的道，去事奉你们素来所不认识的别神，就必受祸。
chapters.en: And a curse, if ye will not obey the commandments of the LORD your God, but turn aside out of the way which I command you this day, to go after other gods, which ye have not known.

chapters.zh: 及至耶和华 ─ 你的神领你进入要去得为业的那地，你就要将祝福的话陈明在基利心山上，将咒诅的话陈明在以巴路山上。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when the LORD thy God hath brought thee in unto the land whither thou goest to possess it, that thou shalt put the blessing upon mount Gerizim, and the curse upon mount Ebal.

chapters.zh: 这二山岂不是在约但河那边，日落之处，在住亚拉巴的迦南人之地与吉甲相对，靠近摩利橡树么？
chapters.en: they not on the other side Jordan, by the way where the sun goeth down, in the land of the Canaanites, which dwell in the champaign over against Gilgal, beside the plains of Moreh?

chapters.zh: 你们要过约但河，进去得耶和华 ─ 你们神所赐你们为业之地，在那地居住。
chapters.en: For ye shall pass over Jordan to go in to possess the land which the LORD your God giveth you, and ye shall possess it, and dwell therein.

chapters.zh: 你们要谨守遵行我今日在你们面前所陈明的一切律例典章。
chapters.en: And ye shall observe to do all the statutes and judgments which I set before you this day.

chapters.zh: 你们存活于世的日子，在耶和华 ─ 你们列祖的神所赐你们为业的地上，要谨守遵行的律例典章乃是这些：
chapters.en: These the statutes and judgments, which ye shall observe to do in the land, which the LORD God of thy fathers giveth thee to possess it, all the days that ye live upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 你们要将所赶出的国民事奉神的各地方，无论是在高山，在小山，在各青翠树下，都毁坏了；
chapters.en: Ye shall utterly destroy all the places, wherein the nations which ye shall possess served their gods, upon the high mountains, and upon the hills, and under every green tree:

chapters.zh: 也要拆毁他们的祭坛，打碎他们的柱像，用火焚烧他们的木偶，砍下他们雕刻的神像，并将其名从那地方除灭。
chapters.en: And ye shall overthrow their altars, and break their pillars, and burn their groves with fire; and ye shall hew down the graven images of their gods, and destroy the names of them out of that place.

chapters.zh: 你们不可照他们那样事奉耶和华 ─ 你们的神。
chapters.en: Ye shall not do so unto the LORD your God.

chapters.zh: 但耶和华 ─ 你们的神从你们各支派中选择何处为立他名的居所，你们就当往那里去求问，
chapters.en: But unto the place which the LORD your God shall choose out of all your tribes to put his name there, unto his habitation shall ye seek, and thither thou shalt come:

chapters.zh: 将你们的燔祭、平安祭、十分取一之物，和手中的举祭，并还愿祭、甘心祭，以及牛群羊群中头生的，都奉到那里。
chapters.en: And thither ye shall bring your burnt offerings, and your sacrifices, and your tithes, and heave offerings of your hand, and your vows, and your freewill offerings, and the firstlings of your herds and of your flocks:

chapters.zh: 在那里，耶和华 ─ 你们神的面前，你们和你们的家属都可以吃，并且因你手所办的一切事蒙耶和华 ─ 你的神赐福，就都欢乐。
chapters.en: And there ye shall eat before the LORD your God, and ye shall rejoice in all that ye put your hand unto, ye and your households, wherein the LORD thy God hath blessed thee.

chapters.zh: 我们今日在这里所行的是各人行自己眼中看为正的事，你们将来不可这样行；
chapters.en: Ye shall not do after all that we do here this day, every man whatsoever right in his own eyes.

chapters.zh: 因为你们还没有到耶和华 ─ 你神所赐你的安息地，所给你的产业。
chapters.en: For ye are not as yet come to the rest and to the inheritance, which the LORD your God giveth you.

chapters.zh: 但你们过了约但河，得以住在耶和华 ─ 你们神使你们承受为业之地，又使你们太平，不被四围的一切仇敌扰乱，安然居住。
chapters.en: But ye go over Jordan, and dwell in the land which the LORD your God giveth you to inherit, and he giveth you rest from all your enemies round about, so that ye dwell in safety;

chapters.zh: 那时要将我所吩咐你们的燔祭、平安祭、十分取一之物，和手中的举祭，并向耶和华许愿献的一切美祭，都奉到耶和华 ─ 你们神所选择要立为他名的居所。
chapters.en: Then there shall be a place which the LORD your God shall choose to cause his name to dwell there; thither shall ye bring all that I command you; your burnt offerings, and your sacrifices, your tithes, and the heave offering of your hand, and all your choice vows which ye vow unto the LORD:

chapters.zh: 你们和儿女、仆婢，并住在你们城里无分无业的利未人，都要在耶和华 ─ 你们的神面前欢乐。
chapters.en: And ye shall rejoice before the LORD your God, ye, and your sons, and your daughters, and your menservants, and your maidservants, and the Levite that within your gates; forasmuch as he hath no part nor inheritance with you.

chapters.zh: 你要谨慎，不可在你所看中的各处献燔祭。
chapters.en: Take heed to thyself that thou offer not thy burnt offerings in every place that thou seest:

chapters.zh: 惟独耶和华从你那一支派中所选择的地方，你就要在那里献燔祭，行我一切所吩咐你的。
chapters.en: But in the place which the LORD shall choose in one of thy tribes, there thou shalt offer thy burnt offerings, and there thou shalt do all that I command thee.

chapters.zh: 然而，在你各城里都可以照耶和华 ─ 你神所赐你的福分，随心所欲宰牲吃肉；无论洁净人不洁净人都可以吃，就如吃羚羊与鹿一般。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding thou mayest kill and eat flesh in all thy gates, whatsoever thy soul lusteth after, according to the blessing of the LORD thy God which he hath given thee: the unclean and the clean may eat thereof, as of the roebuck, and as of the hart.

chapters.zh: 只是不可吃血，要倒在地上，如同倒水一样。
chapters.en: Only ye shall not eat the blood; ye shall pour it upon the earth as water.

chapters.zh: 你的五谷、新酒，和油的十分之一，或是牛群羊群中头生的，或是你许愿献的，甘心献的，或是手中的举祭，都不可在你城里吃。
chapters.en: Thou mayest not eat within thy gates the tithe of thy corn, or of thy wine, or of thy oil, or the firstlings of thy herds or of thy flock, nor any of thy vows which thou vowest, nor thy freewill offerings, or heave offering of thine hand:

chapters.zh: 但要在耶和华 ─ 你的神面前吃，在耶和华 ─ 你神所要选择的地方，你和儿女、仆婢，并住在你城里的利未人，都可以吃；也要因你手所办的，在耶和华 ─ 你神面前欢乐。
chapters.en: But thou must eat them before the LORD thy God in the place which the LORD thy God shall choose, thou, and thy son, and thy daughter, and thy manservant, and thy maidservant, and the Levite that within thy gates: and thou shalt rejoice before the LORD thy God in all that thou puttest thine hands unto.

chapters.zh: 你要谨慎，在你所住的地方永不可丢弃利未人。
chapters.en: Take heed to thyself that thou forsake not the Levite as long as thou livest upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你的神照他所应许扩张你境界的时候，你心里想要吃肉，说：我要吃肉，就可以随心所欲地吃肉。
chapters.en: When the LORD thy God shall enlarge thy border, as he hath promised thee, and thou shalt say, I will eat flesh, because thy soul longeth to eat flesh; thou mayest eat flesh, whatsoever thy soul lusteth after.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神所选择要立他名的地方若离你太远，就可以照我所吩咐的，将耶和华赐给你的牛羊取些宰了，可以随心所欲在你城里吃。
chapters.en: If the place which the LORD thy God hath chosen to put his name there be too far from thee, then thou shalt kill of thy herd and of thy flock, which the LORD hath given thee, as I have commanded thee, and thou shalt eat in thy gates whatsoever thy soul lusteth after.

chapters.zh: 你吃那肉，要像吃羚羊与鹿一般；无论洁净人不洁净人都可以吃。
chapters.en: Even as the roebuck and the hart is eaten, so thou shalt eat them: the unclean and the clean shall eat them alike.

chapters.zh: 只是你要心意坚定，不可吃血，因为血是生命；不可将血（原文作生命）与肉同吃。
chapters.en: Only be sure that thou eat not the blood: for the blood the life; and thou mayest not eat the life with the flesh.

chapters.zh: 不可吃血，要倒在地上，如同倒水一样。
chapters.en: Thou shalt not eat it; thou shalt pour it upon the earth as water.

chapters.zh: 不可吃血。这样，你行耶和华眼中看为正的事，你和你的子孙就可以得福。
