chapters.en: And thy carcase shall be meat unto all fowls of the air, and unto the beasts of the earth, and no man shall fray away.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必用埃及人的疮并痔疮、牛皮癣与疥攻击你，使你不能医治。
chapters.en: The LORD will smite thee with the botch of Egypt, and with the emerods, and with the scab, and with the itch, whereof thou canst not be healed.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必用癫狂、眼瞎、心惊攻击你。
chapters.en: The LORD shall smite thee with madness, and blindness, and astonishment of heart:

chapters.zh: 你必在午间摸索，好像瞎子在暗中摸索一样。你所行的必不亨通，时常遭遇欺压、抢夺，无人搭救。
chapters.en: And thou shalt grope at noonday, as the blind gropeth in darkness, and thou shalt not prosper in thy ways: and thou shalt be only oppressed and spoiled evermore, and no man shall save .

chapters.zh: 你聘定了妻，别人必与他同房；你建造房屋，不得住在其内；你栽种葡萄园，也不得用其中的果子。
chapters.en: Thou shalt betroth a wife, and another man shall lie with her: thou shalt build an house, and thou shalt not dwell therein: thou shalt plant a vineyard, and shalt not gather the grapes thereof.

chapters.zh: 你的牛在你眼前宰了，你必不得吃他的肉；你的驴在你眼前被抢夺，不得归还；你的羊归了仇敌，无人搭救。
chapters.en: Thine ox slain before thine eyes, and thou shalt not eat thereof: thine ass violently taken away from before thy face, and shall not be restored to thee: thy sheep given unto thine enemies, and thou shalt have none to rescue .

chapters.zh: 你的儿女必归与别国的民；你的眼目终日切望，甚至失明，你手中无力拯救。
chapters.en: Thy sons and thy daughters given unto another people, and thine eyes shall look, and fail for them all the day long: and no might in thine hand.

chapters.zh: 你的土产和你劳碌得来的，必被你所不认识的国民吃尽。你时常被欺负，受压制，
chapters.en: The fruit of thy land, and all thy labours, shall a nation which thou knowest not eat up; and thou shalt be only oppressed and crushed alway:

chapters.zh: 甚至你因眼中所看见的，必致疯狂。
chapters.en: So that thou shalt be mad for the sight of thine eyes which thou shalt see.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必攻击你，使你膝上腿上，从脚掌到头顶，长毒疮无法医治。
chapters.en: The LORD shall smite thee in the knees, and in the legs, with a sore botch that cannot be healed, from the sole of thy foot unto the top of thy head.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必将你和你所立的王领到你和你列祖素不认识的国去；在那里你必事奉木头石头的神。
chapters.en: The LORD shall bring thee, and thy king which thou shalt set over thee, unto a nation which neither thou nor thy fathers have known; and there shalt thou serve other gods, wood and stone.

chapters.zh: 你在耶和华领你到的各国中，要令人惊骇、笑谈、讥诮。
chapters.en: And thou shalt become an astonishment, a proverb, and a byword, among all nations whither the LORD shall lead thee.

chapters.zh: 你带到田间的种子虽多，收进来的却少，因为被蝗虫吃了。
chapters.en: Thou shalt carry much seed out into the field, and shalt gather little in; for the locust shall consume it.

chapters.zh: 你栽种、修理葡萄园，却不得收葡萄，也不得喝葡萄酒，因为被虫子吃了。
chapters.en: Thou shalt plant vineyards, and dress , but shalt neither drink the wine, nor gather ; for the worms shall eat them.

chapters.zh: 你全境有橄榄树，却不得其油抹身，因为树上的橄榄不熟自落了。
chapters.en: Thou shalt have olive trees throughout all thy coasts, but thou shalt not anoint with the oil; for thine olive shall cast .

chapters.zh: 你生儿养女，却不算是你的，因为必被掳去。
chapters.en: Thou shalt beget sons and daughters, but thou shalt not enjoy them; for they shall go into captivity.

chapters.zh: 你所有的树木和你地里的出产必被蝗虫所吃。
chapters.en: All thy trees and fruit of thy land shall the locust consume.

chapters.zh: 在你中间寄居的，必渐渐上升，比你高而又高；你必渐渐下降，低而又低。
chapters.en: The stranger that within thee shall get up above thee very high; and thou shalt come down very low.

chapters.zh: 他必借给你，你却不能借给他；他必作首，你必作尾。
chapters.en: He shall lend to thee, and thou shalt not lend to him: he shall be the head, and thou shalt be the tail.

chapters.zh: 这一切咒诅必追随你，赶上你，直到你灭亡；因为你不听从耶和华 ─ 你神的话，不遵守他所吩咐的诫命律例。
chapters.en: Moreover all these curses shall come upon thee, and shall pursue thee, and overtake thee, till thou be destroyed; because thou hearkenedst not unto the voice of the LORD thy God, to keep his commandments and his statutes which he commanded thee:

chapters.zh: 这些咒诅必在你和你后裔的身上成为异迹奇事，直到永远！
chapters.en: And they shall be upon thee for a sign and for a wonder, and upon thy seed for ever.

chapters.zh: 因为你富有的时候，不欢心乐意的事奉耶和华 ─ 你的神，
chapters.en: Because thou servedst not the LORD thy God with joyfulness, and with gladness of heart, for the abundance of all ;

chapters.zh: 所以你必在饥饿、干渴、赤露、缺乏之中事奉耶和华所打发来攻击你的仇敌。他必把铁轭加在你的颈项上，直到将你灭绝。
chapters.en: Therefore shalt thou serve thine enemies which the LORD shall send against thee, in hunger, and in thirst, and in nakedness, and in want of all : and he shall put a yoke of iron upon thy neck, until he have destroyed thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华要从远方、地极带一国的民，如鹰飞来攻击你。这民的言语，你不懂得。
chapters.en: The LORD shall bring a nation against thee from far, from the end of the earth, as the eagle flieth; a nation whose tongue thou shalt not understand;

chapters.zh: 这民的面貌凶恶，不顾恤年老的，也不恩待年少的。
chapters.en: A nation of fierce countenance, which shall not regard the person of the old, nor shew favour to the young:

chapters.zh: 他们必吃你牲畜所下的和你地土所产的，直到你灭亡。你的五谷、新酒，和油，以及牛犊、羊羔，都不给你留下，直到将你灭绝。
chapters.en: And he shall eat the fruit of thy cattle, and the fruit of thy land, until thou be destroyed: which shall not leave thee corn, wine, or oil, the increase of thy kine, or flocks of thy sheep, until he have destroyed thee.

chapters.zh: 他们必将你困在你各 } 城里，直到你所倚靠、高大坚固的城墙都被攻塌。他们必将你困在耶和华 ─ 你神所赐你遍地的各城里。
chapters.en: And he shall besiege thee in all thy gates, until thy high and fenced walls come down, wherein thou trustedst, throughout all thy land: and he shall besiege thee in all thy gates throughout all thy land, which the LORD thy God hath given thee.

chapters.zh: 你在仇敌围困窘迫之中，必吃你本身所生的，就是耶和华 ─ 你神所赐给你的儿女之肉。
chapters.en: And thou shalt eat the fruit of thine own body, the flesh of thy sons and of thy daughters, which the LORD thy God hath given thee, in the siege, and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemies shall distress thee:

chapters.zh: 你们中间，柔弱娇嫩的人必恶眼看他弟兄和他怀中的妻，并他余剩的儿女；
chapters.en: the man tender among you, and very delicate, his eye shall be evil toward his brother, and toward the wife of his bosom, and toward the remnant of his children which he shall leave:

chapters.zh: 甚至在你受仇敌围困窘迫的城中，他要吃儿女的肉，不肯分一点给他的亲人，因为他一无所剩。
chapters.en: So that he will not give to any of them of the flesh of his children whom he shall eat: because he hath nothing left him in the siege, and in the straitness, wherewith thine enemies shall distress thee in all thy gates.

chapters.zh: 你们中间，柔弱娇嫩的妇人，是因娇嫩柔弱不肯把脚踏地的，必恶眼看他怀中的丈夫和他的儿女。
chapters.en: The tender and delicate woman among you, which would not adventure to set the sole of her foot upon the ground for delicateness and tenderness, her eye shall be evil toward the husband of her bosom, and toward her son, and toward her daughter,

chapters.zh: 他两腿中间出来的婴孩与他所要生的儿女，他因缺乏一切就要在你受仇敌围困窘迫的城中将他们暗暗地吃了。
chapters.en: And toward her young one that cometh out from between her feet, and toward her children which she shall bear: for she shall eat them for want of all secretly in the siege and straitness, wherewith thine enemy shall distress thee in thy gates.

chapters.zh: 这书上所写律法的一切话是叫你敬畏耶和华 ─ 你神可荣可畏的名。你若不谨守遵行，耶和华就必将奇灾，就是至大至长的灾，至重至久的病，加在你和你后裔的身上，
chapters.en: If thou wilt not observe to do all the words of this law that are written in this book, that thou mayest fear this glorious and fearful name, THE LORD THY GOD;

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: Then the LORD will make thy plagues wonderful, and the plagues of thy seed, great plagues, and of long continuance, and sore sicknesses, and of long continuance.

chapters.zh: 也必使你所惧怕、埃及人的病都临到你，贴在你身上，
chapters.en: Moreover he will bring upon thee all the diseases of Egypt, which thou wast afraid of; and they shall cleave unto thee.

chapters.zh: 又必将没有写在这律法书上的各样疾病、灾殃降在你身上，直到你灭亡。
chapters.en: Also every sickness, and every plague, which not written in the book of this law, them will the LORD bring upon thee, until thou be destroyed.

chapters.zh: 你们先前虽然像天上的星那样多，却因不听从耶和华 ─ 你神的话，所剩的人数就稀少了。
chapters.en: And ye shall be left few in number, whereas ye were as the stars of heaven for multitude; because thou wouldest not obey the voice of the LORD thy God.

chapters.zh: 先前耶和华怎样喜悦善待你们，使你们众多，也要照样喜悦毁灭你们，使你们灭亡；并且你们从所要进去得的地上必被拔除。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, as the LORD rejoiced over you to do you good, and to multiply you; so the LORD will rejoice over you to destroy you, and to bring you to nought; and ye shall be plucked from off the land whither thou goest to possess it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必使你们分散在万民中，从地这边到地那边，你必在那里事奉你和你列祖素不认识、木头石头的神。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall scatter thee among all people, from the one end of the earth even unto the other; and there thou shalt serve other gods, which neither thou nor thy fathers have known, wood and stone.

chapters.zh: 在那些国中，你必不得安逸，也不得落脚之地；耶和华却使你在那里心中跳动，眼目失明，精神消耗。
chapters.en: And among these nations shalt thou find no ease, neither shall the sole of thy foot have rest: but the LORD shall give thee there a trembling heart, and failing of eyes, and sorrow of mind:

chapters.zh: 你的性命必悬悬无定；你昼夜恐惧，自料性命难保。
chapters.en: And thy life shall hang in doubt before thee; and thou shalt fear day and night, and shalt have none assurance of thy life:

chapters.zh: 你因心里所恐惧的，眼中所看见的，早晨必说，巴不得到晚上才好；晚上必说，巴不得到早晨才好。
chapters.en: In the morning thou shalt say, Would God it were even! and at even thou shalt say, Would God it were morning! for the fear of thine heart wherewith thou shalt fear, and for the sight of thine eyes which thou shalt see.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必使你坐船回埃及去，走我曾告诉你不得再见的路；在那里你必卖己身与仇敌作奴婢，却无人买。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall bring thee into Egypt again with ships, by the way whereof I spake unto thee, Thou shalt see it no more again: and there ye shall be sold unto your enemies for bondmen and bondwomen, and no man shall buy .

chapters.zh: 这是耶和华在摩押地吩咐摩西与以色列人立约的话，是在他和他们于何烈山所立的约之外。
chapters.en: These the words of the covenant, which the LORD commanded Moses to make with the children of Israel in the land of Moab, beside the covenant which he made with them in Horeb.

chapters.zh: 摩西召了以色列众人来，对他们说：耶和华在埃及地，在你们眼前向法老和他众臣仆，并他全地所行的一切事，你们都看见了，
chapters.en: And Moses called unto all Israel, and said unto them, Ye have seen all that the LORD did before your eyes in the land of Egypt unto Pharaoh, and unto all his servants, and unto all his land;

chapters.zh: 就是你亲眼看见的大试验和神迹，并那些大奇事。
chapters.en: The great temptations which thine eyes have seen, the signs, and those great miracles:

chapters.zh: 但耶和华到今日没有使你们心能明白，眼能看见，耳能听见。
chapters.en: Yet the LORD hath not given you an heart to perceive, and eyes to see, and ears to hear, unto this day.

chapters.zh: 我领你们在旷野四十年，你们身上的衣服并没有穿破，脚上的鞋也没有穿坏。
chapters.en: And I have led you forty years in the wilderness: your clothes are not waxen old upon you, and thy shoe is not waxen old upon thy foot.

chapters.zh: 你们没有吃饼，也没有喝清酒浓酒。这要使你们知道，耶和华是你们的神。
chapters.en: Ye have not eaten bread, neither have ye drunk wine or strong drink: that ye might know that I the LORD your God.

chapters.zh: 你们来到这地方，希实本王西宏、巴珊王噩都出来与我们交战，我们就击杀了他们，
chapters.en: And when ye came unto this place, Sihon the king of Heshbon, and Og the king of Bashan, came out against us unto battle, and we smote them:

chapters.zh: 取了他们的地给流便支派、迦得支派，和玛拿西半支派为业。
chapters.en: And we took their land, and gave it for an inheritance unto the Reubenites, and to the Gadites, and to the half tribe of Manasseh.

chapters.zh: 所以你们要谨守遵行这约的话，好叫你们在一切所行的事上亨通。
chapters.en: Keep therefore the words of this covenant, and do them, that ye may prosper in all that ye do.

chapters.zh: 今日，你们的首领、族长（原文作支派）、长老、官长、以色列的男丁，你们的妻子儿女，和营中寄居的，以及为你们劈柴挑水的人，都站在耶和华 ─ 你们的神面前，
chapters.en: Ye stand this day all of you before the LORD your God; your captains of your tribes, your elders, and your officers, all the men of Israel,

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: Your little ones, your wives, and thy stranger that in thy camp, from the hewer of thy wood unto the drawer of thy water:

chapters.zh: 为要你顺从耶和华 ─ 你神今日与你所立的约，向你所起的誓。
chapters.en: That thou shouldest enter into covenant with the LORD thy God, and into his oath, which the LORD thy God maketh with thee this day:

chapters.zh: 这样，他要照他向你所应许的话，又向你列祖亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各所起的誓，今日立你作他的子民，他作你的神。这样，他要照他向你所应许的话，又向你列祖亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各所起的誓，今日立你作他的子民，他作你的神。
chapters.en: That he may establish thee to day for a people unto himself, and he may be unto thee a God, as he hath said unto thee, and as he hath sworn unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob.

chapters.zh: 我不但与你们立这约，起这誓，
chapters.en: Neither with you only do I make this covenant and this oath;

chapters.zh: 凡与我们一同站在耶和华 ─ 我们神面前的，并今日不在我们这里的人，我也与他们立这约，起这誓。
chapters.en: But with that standeth here with us this day before the LORD our God, and also with that not here with us this day:

chapters.zh: 我们曾住过埃及地，也从列国经过；这是你们知道的。
chapters.en: (For ye know how we have dwelt in the land of Egypt; and how we came through the nations which ye passed by;

chapters.zh: 你们也看见他们中间可憎之物，并他们木、石、金、银的偶像。
chapters.en: And ye have seen their abominations, and their idols, wood and stone, silver and gold, which among them:)

chapters.zh: 惟恐你们中间，或男或女，或族长或支派长，今日心里偏离耶和华 ─ 我们的神，去事奉那些国的神；又怕你们中间有恶根生出苦菜和茵 𫈟 来，
chapters.en: Lest there should be among you man, or woman, or family, or tribe, whose heart turneth away this day from the LORD our God, to go serve the gods of these nations; lest there should be among you a root that beareth gall and wormwood;

chapters.zh: 听见这咒诅的话，心里仍是自夸说：我虽然行事心里顽梗，连累众人，却还是平安。
chapters.en: And it come to pass, when he heareth the words of this curse, that he bless himself in his heart, saying, I shall have peace, though I walk in the imagination of mine heart, to add drunkenness to thirst:

chapters.zh: 耶和华必不饶恕他；耶和华的怒气与愤恨要向他发作，如烟冒出，将这书上所写的一切咒诅都加在他身上。耶和华又要从天下涂抹他的名，
chapters.en: The LORD will not spare him, but then the anger of the LORD and his jealousy shall smoke against that man, and all the curses that are written in this book shall lie upon him, and the LORD shall blot out his name from under heaven.

chapters.zh: 也必照著写在律法书上、约中的一切咒诅将他从以色列众支派中分别出来，使他受祸。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall separate him unto evil out of all the tribes of Israel, according to all the curses of the covenant that are written in this book of the law:

chapters.zh: 你们的后代，就是以后兴起来的子孙，和远方来的外人，看见这地的灾殃，并耶和华所降与这地的疾病，
chapters.en: So that the generation to come of your children that shall rise up after you, and the stranger that shall come from a far land, shall say, when they see the plagues of that land, and the sicknesses which the LORD hath laid upon it;

chapters.zh: 又看见遍地有硫磺，有盐卤，有火迹，没有耕种，没有出产，连草都不生长 ─ 好像耶和华在忿怒中所倾覆的所多玛、蛾摩拉、押玛、洗扁一样 ─
chapters.en: the whole land thereof brimstone, and salt, burning, it is not sown, nor beareth, nor any grass groweth therein, like the overthrow of Sodom, and Gomorrah, Admah, and Zeboim, which the LORD overthrew in his anger, and in his wrath:

chapters.zh: 所看见的人，连万国人，都必问说：耶和华为何向此地这样行呢？这样大发烈怒是甚么意思呢？
chapters.en: Even all nations shall say, Wherefore hath the LORD done thus unto this land? what the heat of this great anger?

chapters.zh: 人必回答说：是因这地的人离弃了耶和华 ─ 他们列祖的神，领他们出埃及地的时候与他们所立的约，
chapters.en: Then men shall say, Because they have forsaken the covenant of the LORD God of their fathers, which he made with them when he brought them forth out of the land of Egypt:

chapters.zh: 去事奉敬拜素不认识的别神，是耶和华所未曾给他们安排的。
chapters.en: For they went and served other gods, and worshipped them, gods whom they knew not, and he had not given unto them:

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华的怒气向这地发作，将这书上所写的一切咒诅都降在这地上。
chapters.en: And the anger of the LORD was kindled against this land, to bring upon it all the curses that are written in this book:

chapters.zh: 耶和华在怒气、忿怒、大恼恨中将他们从本地拔出来，扔在别的地上，像今日一样。
chapters.en: And the LORD rooted them out of their land in anger, and in wrath, and in great indignation, and cast them into another land, as this day.

chapters.zh: 隐秘的事是属耶和华 ─ 我们神的；惟有明显的事是永远属我们和我们子孙的，好叫我们遵行这律法上的一切话。
chapters.en: The secret unto the LORD our God: but those revealed unto us and to our children for ever, that may do all the words of this law.

chapters.zh: 我所陈明在你面前的这一切咒诅都临到你身上；你在耶和华 ─ 你神追赶你到的万国中必心里追念祝福的话；
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when all these things are come upon thee, the blessing and the curse, which I have set before thee, and thou shalt call to mind among all the nations, whither the LORD thy God hath driven thee,

chapters.zh: 你和你的子孙若尽心尽性归向耶和华 ─ 你的神，照著我今日一切所吩咐的听从他的话；
chapters.en: And shalt return unto the LORD thy God, and shalt obey his voice according to all that I command thee this day, thou and thy children, with all thine heart, and with all thy soul;

chapters.zh: 那时，耶和华 ─ 你的神必怜恤你，救回你这被掳的子民；耶和华 ─ 你的神要回转过来，从分散你到的万民中将你招聚回来。
chapters.en: That then the LORD thy God will turn thy captivity, and have compassion upon thee, and will return and gather thee from all the nations, whither the LORD thy God hath scattered thee.

chapters.zh: 你被赶散的人，就是在天涯的，耶和华 ─ 你的神也必从那里将你招聚回来。
chapters.en: If of thine be driven out unto the outmost of heaven, from thence will the LORD thy God gather thee, and from thence will he fetch thee:

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你的神必领你进入你列祖所得的地，使你可以得著；又必善待你，使你的人数比你列祖众多。
chapters.en: And the LORD thy God will bring thee into the land which thy fathers possessed, and thou shalt possess it; and he will do thee good, and multiply thee above thy fathers.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你神必将你心里和你后裔心里的污秽除掉，好叫你尽心尽性爱耶和华 ─ 你的神，使你可以存活。
chapters.en: And the LORD thy God will circumcise thine heart, and the heart of thy seed, to love the LORD thy God with all thine heart, and with all thy soul, that thou mayest live.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你的神必将这一切咒诅加在你仇敌和恨恶你、逼迫你的人身上。
chapters.en: And the LORD thy God will put all these curses upon thine enemies, and on them that hate thee, which persecuted thee.

chapters.zh: 你必归回，听从耶和华的话，遵行他的一切诫命，就是我今日所吩咐你的。
chapters.en: And thou shalt return and obey the voice of the LORD, and do all his commandments which I command thee this day.

chapters.zh: 你若听从耶和华 ─ 你神的话，谨守这律法书上所写的诫命律例，又尽心尽性归向耶和华 ─ 你的神，他必使你手里所办的一切事，并你身所生的，牲畜所下的，地土所产的，都绰绰有余；因为耶和华必再喜悦你，降福与你，像从前喜悦你列祖一样。
chapters.en: And the LORD thy God will make thee plenteous in every work of thine hand, in the fruit of thy body, and in the fruit of thy cattle, and in the fruit of thy land, for good: for the LORD will again rejoice over thee for good, as he rejoiced over thy fathers:

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: If thou shalt hearken unto the voice of the LORD thy God, to keep his commandments and his statutes which are written in this book of the law, if thou turn unto the LORD thy God with all thine heart, and with all thy soul.

chapters.zh: 我今日所吩咐你的诫命不是你难行的，也不是离你远的；
chapters.en: For this commandment which I command thee this day, it not hidden from thee, neither it far off.

chapters.zh: 不是在天上，使你说：谁替我们上天取下来，使我们听见可以遵行呢？
chapters.en: It not in heaven, that thou shouldest say, Who shall go up for us to heaven, and bring it unto us, that we may hear it, and do it?

chapters.zh: 也不是在海外，使你说：谁替我们过海取了来，使我们听见可以遵行呢？
chapters.en: Neither it beyond the sea, that thou shouldest say, Who shall go over the sea for us, and bring it unto us, that we may hear it, and do it?

chapters.zh: 这话却离你甚近，就在你口中，在你心里，使你可以遵行。
chapters.en: But the word very nigh unto thee, in thy mouth, and in thy heart, that thou mayest do it.

chapters.zh: 看哪，我今日将生与福，死与祸，陈明在你面前。
chapters.en: See, I have set before thee this day life and good, and death and evil;

chapters.zh: 吩咐你爱耶和华 ─ 你的神，遵行他的道，谨守他的诫命、律例、典章，使你可以存活，人数增多，耶和华 ─ 你神就必在你所要进去得为业的地上赐福与你。
chapters.en: In that I command thee this day to love the LORD thy God, to walk in his ways, and to keep his commandments and his statutes and his judgments, that thou mayest live and multiply: and the LORD thy God shall bless thee in the land whither thou goest to possess it.

chapters.zh: 倘若你心里偏离，不肯听从，却被勾引去敬拜事奉别神，
chapters.en: But if thine heart turn away, so that thou wilt not hear, but shalt be drawn away, and worship other gods, and serve them;

chapters.zh: 我今日明明告诉你们，你们必要灭亡；在你过约但河、进去得为业的地上，你的日子必不长久。
chapters.en: I denounce unto you this day, that ye shall surely perish, ye shall not prolong days upon the land, whither thou passest over Jordan to go to possess it.

chapters.zh: 我今日呼天唤地向你作见证；我将生死祸福陈明在你面前，所以你要拣选生命，使你和你的后裔都得存活；
chapters.en: I call heaven and earth to record this day against you, I have set before you life and death, blessing and cursing: therefore choose life, that both thou and thy seed may live:

chapters.zh: 且且爱耶和华 ─ 你的神，听从他的话，专靠他；因为他是你的生命，你的日子长久也在乎他。这样，你就可以在耶和华向你列祖亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓应许所赐的地上居住。
chapters.en: That thou mayest love the LORD thy God, that thou mayest obey his voice, and that thou mayest cleave unto him: for he thy life, and the length of thy days: that thou mayest dwell in the land which the LORD sware unto thy fathers, to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, to give them.

chapters.zh: 摩西去告诉以色列众人
chapters.en: And Moses went and spake these words unto all Israel.

chapters.zh: 说：我现在一百二十岁了，不能照常出入；耶和华也曾对我说：你必不得过这约但河。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, I an hundred and twenty years old this day; I can no more go out and come in: also the LORD hath said unto me, Thou shalt not go over this Jordan.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你们的神必引导你们过去，将这些国民在你们面前灭绝，你们就得他们的地。约书亚必引导你们过去，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: The LORD thy God, he will go over before thee, he will destroy these nations from before thee, and thou shalt possess them: Joshua, he shall go over before thee, as the LORD hath said.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必待他们，如同从前待他所灭绝的亚摩利二王西宏与噩以及他们的国一样。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall do unto them as he did to Sihon and to Og, kings of the Amorites, and unto the land of them, whom he destroyed.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必将他们交给你们；你们要照我所吩咐的一切命令待他们。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall give them up before your face, that ye may do unto them according unto all the commandments which I have commanded you.

chapters.zh: 你们当刚强壮胆，不要害怕，也不要畏惧他们，因为耶和华 ─ 你的神和你同去。他必不撇下你，也不丢弃你。
chapters.en: Be strong and of a good courage, fear not, nor be afraid of them: for the LORD thy God, he that doth go with thee; he will not fail thee, nor forsake thee.

chapters.zh: 摩西召了约书亚来，在以色列众人眼前对他说：你当刚强壮胆！因为，你要和这百姓一同进入耶和华向他们列祖起誓应许所赐之地；你也要使他们承受那地为业。
chapters.en: And Moses called unto Joshua, and said unto him in the sight of all Israel, Be strong and of a good courage: for thou must go with this people unto the land which the LORD hath sworn unto their fathers to give them; and thou shalt cause them to inherit it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必在你前面行；他必与你同在，必不撇下你，也不丢弃你。不要惧怕，也不要惊惶。
chapters.en: And the LORD, he that doth go before thee; he will be with thee, he will not fail thee, neither forsake thee: fear not, neither be dismayed.

chapters.zh: 摩西将这律法写出来，交给抬耶和华约柜的祭司利未子孙和以色列的众长老。
chapters.en: And Moses wrote this law, and delivered it unto the priests the sons of Levi, which bare the ark of the covenant of the LORD, and unto all the elders of Israel.

chapters.zh: 摩西吩咐他们说：每逢七年的末一年，就在豁免年的定期住棚节的时候，
chapters.en: And Moses commanded them, saying, At the end of seven years, in the solemnity of the year of release, in the feast of tabernacles,

chapters.zh: 以色列众人来到耶和华 ─ 你神所选择的地方朝见他。那时，你要在以色列众人面前将这律法念给他们听。
chapters.en: When all Israel is come to appear before the LORD thy God in the place which he shall choose, thou shalt read this law before all Israel in their hearing.

chapters.zh: 要招聚他们男、女、孩子，并城里寄居的，使他们听，使他们学习，好敬畏耶和华 ─ 你们的神，谨守、遵行这律法的一切话，
chapters.en: Gather the people together, men, and women, and children, and thy stranger that within thy gates, that they may hear, and that they may learn, and fear the LORD your God, and observe to do all the words of this law:

chapters.zh: 也使他们未曾晓得这律法的儿女得以听见，学习敬畏耶和华 ─ 你们的神，在你们过约但河要得为业之地，存活的日子，常常这样行。
chapters.en: And their children, which have not known , may hear, and learn to fear the LORD your God, as long as ye live in the land whither ye go over Jordan to possess it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对摩西说：你的死期临近了；要召约书亚来，你们二人站在会幕里，我好嘱咐他。于是摩西和约书亚去站在会幕里。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Behold, thy days approach that thou must die: call Joshua, and present yourselves in the tabernacle of the congregation, that I may give him a charge. And Moses and Joshua went, and presented themselves in the tabernacle of the congregation.

chapters.zh: 耶和华在会幕里云柱中显现，云柱停在会幕门以上。
chapters.en: And the LORD appeared in the tabernacle in a pillar of a cloud: and the pillar of the cloud stood over the door of the tabernacle.

chapters.zh: 耶和华又对摩西说：你必和你列祖同睡。这百姓要起来，在他们所要去的地上，在那地的人中，随从外邦神行邪淫，离弃我，违背我与他们所立的约。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Moses, Behold, thou shalt sleep with thy fathers; and this people will rise up, and go a whoring after the gods of the strangers of the land, whither they go among them, and will forsake me, and break my covenant which I have made with them.

chapters.zh: 那时，我的怒气必向他们发作；我也必离弃他们，掩面不顾他们，以致他们被吞灭，并有许多的祸患灾难临到他们。那日他们必说：这些祸患临到我们，岂不是因我们的神不在我们中间么？
chapters.en: Then my anger shall be kindled against them in that day, and I will forsake them, and I will hide my face from them, and they shall be devoured, and many evils and troubles shall befall them; so that they will say in that day, Are not these evils come upon us, because our God not among us?

chapters.zh: 那时，因他们偏向别神所行的一切恶，我必定掩面不顾他们。
chapters.en: And I will surely hide my face in that day for all the evils which they shall have wrought, in that they are turned unto other gods.

chapters.zh: 现在你要写一篇歌，教导以色列人，传给他们，使这歌见证他们的不是；
chapters.en: Now therefore write ye this song for you, and teach it the children of Israel: put it in their mouths, that this song may be a witness for me against the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 因为我将他们领进我向他们列祖起誓应许那流奶与蜜之地，他们在那里吃得饱足，身体肥胖，就必偏向别神，事奉他们，藐视我，背弃我的约。
chapters.en: For when I shall have brought them into the land which I sware unto their fathers, that floweth with milk and honey; and they shall have eaten and filled themselves, and waxen fat; then will they turn unto other gods, and serve them, and provoke me, and break my covenant.

chapters.zh: 那时，有许多祸患灾难临到他们，这歌必在他们面前作见证，他们后裔的口中必念诵不忘。我未领他们到我所起誓应许之地以先，他们所怀的意念我都知道了。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when many evils and troubles are befallen them, that this song shall testify against them as a witness; for it shall not be forgotten out of the mouths of their seed: for I know their imagination which they go about, even now, before I have brought them into the land which I sware.

chapters.zh: 当日摩西就写了一篇歌，教导以色列人。
chapters.en: Moses therefore wrote this song the same day, and taught it the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华嘱咐嫩的儿子约书亚说：你当刚强壮胆，因为你必领以色列人进我所起誓应许他们的地；我必与你同在。
chapters.en: And he gave Joshua the son of Nun a charge, and said, Be strong and of a good courage: for thou shalt bring the children of Israel into the land which I sware unto them: and I will be with thee.

chapters.zh: 摩西将这律法的话写在书上，及至写完了，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Moses had made an end of writing the words of this law in a book, until they were finished,

chapters.zh: 就吩咐抬耶和华约柜的利未人说：
chapters.en: That Moses commanded the Levites, which bare the ark of the covenant of the LORD, saying,

chapters.zh: 将这律法书放在耶和华 ─ 你们神的约柜旁，可以在那里见证以色列人的不是；
chapters.en: Take this book of the law, and put it in the side of the ark of the covenant of the LORD your God, that it may be there for a witness against thee.

chapters.zh: 因为我知道你们是悖逆的，是硬著颈项的。我今日还活著与你们同在，你们尚且悖逆耶和华，何况我死后呢？
chapters.en: For I know thy rebellion, and thy stiff neck: behold, while I am yet alive with you this day, ye have been rebellious against the LORD; and how much more after my death?

chapters.zh: 你们要将你们支派的众长老和官长都招聚了来，我好将这些话说与他们听，并呼天唤地见证他们的不是。
chapters.en: Gather unto me all the elders of your tribes, and your officers, that I may speak these words in their ears, and call heaven and earth to record against them.

chapters.zh: 我知道我死后，你们必全然败坏，偏离我所吩咐你们的道，行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，以手所做的惹他发怒；日后必有祸患临到你们。
chapters.en: For I know that after my death ye will utterly corrupt , and turn aside from the way which I have commanded you; and evil will befall you in the latter days; because ye will do evil in the sight of the LORD, to provoke him to anger through the work of your hands.

chapters.zh: 摩西将这一篇歌的话都说与以色列全会众听。
chapters.en: And Moses spake in the ears of all the congregation of Israel the words of this song, until they were ended.

chapters.zh: 诸天哪，侧耳，我要说话；愿地也听我口中的言语。
chapters.en: Give ear, O ye heavens, and I will speak; and hear, O earth, the words of my mouth.

chapters.zh: 我的教训要淋漓如雨；我的言语要滴落如露，如细雨降在嫩草上，如甘霖降在菜蔬中。
chapters.en: My doctrine shall drop as the rain, my speech shall distil as the dew, as the small rain upon the tender herb, and as the showers upon the grass:

chapters.zh: 我要宣告耶和华的名；你们要将大德归与我们的神。
chapters.en: Because I will publish the name of the LORD: ascribe ye greatness unto our God.

chapters.zh: 他是磐石，他的作为完全；他所行的无不公平，是诚实无伪的神，又公义，又正直。
chapters.en: the Rock, his work perfect: for all his ways judgment: a God of truth and without iniquity, just and right he.

chapters.zh: 这乖僻弯曲的世代向他行事邪僻；有这弊病就不是他的儿女。
chapters.en: They have corrupted themselves, their spot not of his children: a perverse and crooked generation.

chapters.zh: 愚昧无知的民哪，你们这样报答耶和华么？他岂不是你的父、将你买来的么？他是制造你、建立你的。
chapters.en: Do ye thus requite the LORD, O foolish people and unwise? not he thy father hath bought thee? hath he not made thee, and established thee?

chapters.zh: 你当追想上古之日，思念历代之年；问你的父亲，他必指示你；问你的长者，他必告诉你。
chapters.en: Remember the days of old, consider the years of many generations: ask thy father, and he will shew thee; thy elders, and they will tell thee.

chapters.zh: 至高者将地业赐给列邦，将世人分开，就照以色列人的数目立定万民的疆界。
chapters.en: When the most High divided to the nations their inheritance, when he separated the sons of Adam, he set the bounds of the people according to the number of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的分本是他的百姓；他的产业本是雅各。
chapters.en: For the LORD'S portion his people; Jacob the lot of his inheritance.

chapters.zh: 耶和华遇见他在旷野 ─ 荒凉野兽吼叫之地，就环绕他，看顾他，保护他，如同保护眼中的瞳人。
chapters.en: He found him in a desert land, and in the waste howling wilderness; he led him about, he instructed him, he kept him as the apple of his eye.

chapters.zh: 又如鹰搅动巢窝，在雏鹰以上两翅搧展，接取雏鹰，背在两翼之上。
chapters.en: As an eagle stirreth up her nest, fluttereth over her young, spreadeth abroad her wings, taketh them, beareth them on her wings:

chapters.zh: 这样，耶和华独自引导他，并无外邦神与他同在。
chapters.en: the LORD alone did lead him, and no strange god with him.

chapters.zh: 耶和华使他乘驾地的高处，得吃田间的土产；又使他从磐石中咂蜜，从坚石中吸油；
chapters.en: He made him ride on the high places of the earth, that he might eat the increase of the fields; and he made him to suck honey out of the rock, and oil out of the flinty rock;

chapters.zh: 也吃牛的奶油，羊的奶，羊羔的脂油，巴珊所出的公绵羊和山羊，与上好的麦子，也喝葡萄汁酿的酒。
chapters.en: Butter of kine, and milk of sheep, with fat of lambs, and rams of the breed of Bashan, and goats, with the fat of kidneys of wheat; and thou didst drink the pure blood of the grape.

chapters.zh: 但耶书仑渐渐肥胖，粗壮，光润，踢跳，奔跑，便离弃造他的神，轻看救他的磐石；
chapters.en: But Jeshurun waxed fat, and kicked: thou art waxen fat, thou art grown thick, thou art covered ; then he forsook God made him, and lightly esteemed the Rock of his salvation.

chapters.zh: 敬拜别神，触动神的愤恨，行可憎恶的事，惹了他的怒气。
chapters.en: They provoked him to jealousy with strange , with abominations provoked they him to anger.

chapters.zh: 所祭祀的鬼魔并非真神，乃是素不认识的神，是近来新兴的，是你列祖所不畏惧的。
chapters.en: They sacrificed unto devils, not to God; to gods whom they knew not, to new came newly up, whom your fathers feared not.

chapters.zh: 你轻忽生你的磐石，忘记产你的神。
chapters.en: Of the Rock begat thee thou art unmindful, and hast forgotten God that formed thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华看见他的儿女惹动他，就厌恶他们，说：
chapters.en: And when the LORD saw , he abhorred , because of the provoking of his sons, and of his daughters.

chapters.zh: 我要向他们掩面，看他们的结局如何。他们本是极乖僻的族类，心中无诚实的儿女。
chapters.en: And he said, I will hide my face from them, I will see what their end : for they a very froward generation, children in whom no faith.

chapters.zh: 他们以那不算为神的触动我的愤恨，以虚无的神惹了我的怒气。我也要以那不成子民的触动他们的愤恨，以愚昧的国民惹了他们的怒气。
chapters.en: They have moved me to jealousy with not God; they have provoked me to anger with their vanities: and I will move them to jealousy with not a people; I will provoke them to anger with a foolish nation.

chapters.zh: 因为在我怒中有火烧起，直烧到极深的阴间，把地和地的出产尽都焚烧，山的根基也烧著了。
chapters.en: For a fire is kindled in mine anger, and shall burn unto the lowest hell, and shall consume the earth with her increase, and set on fire the foundations of the mountains.

chapters.zh: 我要将祸患堆在他们身上，把我的箭向他们射尽。
chapters.en: I will heap mischiefs upon them; I will spend mine arrows upon them.

chapters.zh: 他们必因饥饿消瘦，被炎热苦毒吞灭。我要打发野兽用牙齿咬他们，并土中腹行的，用毒气害他们。
chapters.en: burnt with hunger, and devoured with burning heat, and with bitter destruction: I will also send the teeth of beasts upon them, with the poison of serpents of the dust.

chapters.zh: 外头有刀剑，内室有惊恐，使人丧亡，使少男、童女、吃奶的、白发的，尽都灭绝。
chapters.en: The sword without, and terror within, shall destroy both the young man and the virgin, the suckling with the man of gray hairs.

chapters.zh: 我说，我必将他们分散远方，使他们的名号从人间除灭。
chapters.en: I said, I would scatter them into corners, I would make the remembrance of them to cease from among men:

chapters.zh: 惟恐仇敌惹动我，只怕敌人错看，说：是我们手的能力，并非耶和华所行的。
chapters.en: Were it not that I feared the wrath of the enemy, lest their adversaries should behave themselves strangely, lest they should say, Our hand high, and the LORD hath not done all this.

chapters.zh: 因为以色列民毫无计谋，心中没有聪明。
chapters.en: For they a nation void of counsel, neither understanding in them.

chapters.zh: 惟愿他们有智慧，能明白这事，肯思念他们的结局。
chapters.en: O that they were wise, they understood this, they would consider their latter end!

chapters.zh: 若不是他们的磐石卖了他们，若不是耶和华交出他们，一人焉能追赶他们千人？二人焉能使万人逃跑呢？
chapters.en: How should one chase a thousand, and two put ten thousand to flight, except their Rock had sold them, and the LORD had shut them up?

chapters.zh: 据我们的仇敌自己断定，他们的磐石不如我们的磐石。
chapters.en: For their rock not as our Rock, even our enemies themselves judges.

chapters.zh: 他们的葡萄树是所多玛的葡萄树，蛾摩拉田园所生的；他们的葡萄是毒葡萄，全挂都是苦的。
chapters.en: For their vine of the vine of Sodom, and of the fields of Gomorrah: their grapes grapes of gall, their clusters bitter:

chapters.zh: 他们的酒是大蛇的毒气，是虺蛇残害的恶毒。
chapters.en: Their wine the poison of dragons, and the cruel venom of asps.

chapters.zh: 这不都是积蓄在我这里，封锁在我府库中么？
chapters.en: not this laid up in store with me, sealed up among my treasures?

chapters.zh: 他们失脚的时候，伸冤报应在我；因他们遭灾的日子近了；那要临在他们身上的必速速来到。
chapters.en: To me vengeance, and recompence; their foot shall slide in time: for the day of their calamity at hand, and the things that shall come upon them make haste.

chapters.zh: 耶和华见他百姓毫无能力，无论困住的、自由的都没有剩下，就必为他们伸冤，为他的仆人后悔。
chapters.en: For the LORD shall judge his people, and repent himself for his servants, when he seeth that power is gone, and none shut up, or left.

chapters.zh: 他必说：他们的神，他们所投靠的磐石，
chapters.en: And he shall say, Where their gods, rock in whom they trusted,

chapters.zh: 就是向来吃他们祭牲的脂油，喝他们奠祭之酒的，在那里呢？他可以兴起帮助你们，护卫你们。
chapters.en: Which did eat the fat of their sacrifices, drank the wine of their drink offerings? let them rise up and help you, be your protection.

chapters.zh: 你们如今要知道：我，惟有我是神；在我以外并无别神。我使人死，我使人活；我损伤，我也医治，并无人能从我手中救出来。
chapters.en: See now that I, I, he, and no god with me: I kill, and I make alive; I wound, and I heal: neither that can deliver out of my hand.

chapters.zh: 我向天举手说：我凭我的永生起誓：
chapters.en: For I lift up my hand to heaven, and say, I live for ever.

chapters.zh: 我若磨我闪亮的刀，手掌审判之权，就必报复我的敌人，报应恨我的人。
chapters.en: If I whet my glittering sword, and mine hand take hold on judgment; I will render vengeance to mine enemies, and will reward them that hate me.

chapters.zh: 我要使我的箭饮血饮醉，就是被杀被掳之人的血。我的刀要吃肉，乃是仇敌中首领之头的肉。
chapters.en: I will make mine arrows drunk with blood, and my sword shall devour flesh; with the blood of the slain and of the captives, from the beginning of revenges upon the enemy.

chapters.zh: 你们外邦人当与主的百姓一同欢呼；因他要伸他仆人流血的冤，报应他的敌人，洁净他的地，救赎他的百姓。
chapters.en: Rejoice, O ye nations, his people: for he will avenge the blood of his servants, and will render vengeance to his adversaries, and will be merciful unto his land, to his people.

chapters.zh: 摩西和嫩的儿子约书亚去将这歌的一切话说给百姓听。
chapters.en: And Moses came and spake all the words of this song in the ears of the people, he, and Hoshea the son of Nun.

chapters.zh: 摩西向以色列众人说完了这一切的话，
chapters.en: And Moses made an end of speaking all these words to all Israel:

chapters.zh: 又说：我今日所警教你们的，你们都要放在心上；要吩咐你们的子孙谨守遵行这律法上的话。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Set your hearts unto all the words which I testify among you this day, which ye shall command your children to observe to do, all the words of this law.

chapters.zh: 因为这不是虚空、与你们无关的事，乃是你们的生命；在你们过约但河要得为业的地上必因这事日子得以长久。
chapters.en: For it not a vain thing for you; because it your life: and through this thing ye shall prolong days in the land, whither ye go over Jordan to possess it.

chapters.zh: 当日，耶和华吩咐摩西说：
chapters.en: And the LORD spake unto Moses that selfsame day, saying,

chapters.zh: 你上这亚巴琳山中的尼波山去，在摩押地与耶利哥相对，观看我所要赐给以色列人为业的迦南地。
chapters.en: Get thee up into this mountain Abarim, mount Nebo, which in the land of Moab, that over against Jericho; and behold the land of Canaan, which I give unto the children of Israel for a possession:

chapters.zh: 你必死在你所登的山上，归你列祖（原文作本民）去，像你哥哥亚伦死在何珥山上，归他的列祖一样。
chapters.en: And die in the mount whither thou goest up, and be gathered unto thy people; as Aaron thy brother died in mount Hor, and was gathered unto his people:

chapters.zh: 因为你们在寻的旷野，加低斯的米利巴水，在以色列人中没有尊我为圣，得罪了我。
chapters.en: Because ye trespassed against me among the children of Israel at the waters of Meribah-Kadesh, in the wilderness of Zin; because ye sanctified me not in the midst of the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 我所赐给以色列人的地，你可以远远地观看，却不得进去。
chapters.en: Yet thou shalt see the land before ; but thou shalt not go thither unto the land which I give the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 以下是神人摩西在未死之先为以色列人所祝的福：
chapters.en: And this the blessing, wherewith Moses the man of God blessed the children of Israel before his death.

chapters.zh: 他说：耶和华从西乃而来，从西珥向他们显现，从巴兰山发出光辉，从万万圣者中来临，从他右手为百姓传出烈火的律法。
chapters.en: And he said, The LORD came from Sinai, and rose up from Seir unto them; he shined forth from mount Paran, and he came with ten thousands of saints: from his right hand a fiery law for them.

chapters.zh: 他疼爱百姓；众圣徒都在他手中。他们坐在他的脚下，领受他的言语。
chapters.en: Yea, he loved the people; all his saints in thy hand: and they sat down at thy feet; shall receive of thy words.

chapters.zh: 摩西将律法传给我们，作为雅各会众的产业。
chapters.en: Moses commanded us a law, the inheritance of the congregation of Jacob.

chapters.zh: 百姓的众首领，以色列的各支派，一同聚会的时候，耶和华（原文作他）在耶书仑中为王。
chapters.en: And he was king in Jeshurun, when the heads of the people the tribes of Israel were gathered together.

chapters.zh: 愿流便存活，不至死亡；愿他人数不致稀少。
chapters.en: Let Reuben live, and not die; and let his men be few.

chapters.zh: 为犹大祝福说：求耶和华俯听犹大的声音，引导他归于本族；他曾用手为自己争战，你必帮助他攻击敌人。
chapters.en: And this of Judah: and he said, Hear, LORD, the voice of Judah, and bring him unto his people: let his hands be sufficient for him; and be thou an help from his enemies.

chapters.zh: 论利未说：耶和华阿，你的土明和乌陵都在你的虔诚人那里。你在玛撒曾试验他，在米利巴水与他争论。
chapters.en: And of Levi he said, thy Thummim and thy Urim with thy holy one, whom thou didst prove at Massah, whom thou didst strive at the waters of Meribah;

chapters.zh: 他论自己的父母说：我未曾看见；他也不承认弟兄，也不认识自己的儿女。这是因利未人遵行你的话，谨守你的约。
chapters.en: Who said unto his father and to his mother, I have not seen him; neither did he acknowledge his brethren, nor knew his own children: for they have observed thy word, and kept thy covenant.

chapters.zh: 他们要将你的典章教训雅各，将你的律法教训以色列。他们要把香焚在你面前，把全牲的燔祭献在你的坛上。
chapters.en: They shall teach Jacob thy judgments, and Israel thy law: they shall put incense before thee, and whole burnt sacrifice upon thine altar.

chapters.zh: 求耶和华降福在他的财物上，悦纳他手里所办的事。那些起来攻击他和恨恶他的人，愿你刺透他们的腰，使他们不得再起来。
chapters.en: Bless, LORD, his substance, and accept the work of his hands: smite through the loins of them that rise against him, and of them that hate him, that they rise not again.

chapters.zh: 论便雅悯说：耶和华所亲爱的必同耶和华安然居住；耶和华终日遮蔽他，也住在他两肩之中。
chapters.en: of Benjamin he said, The beloved of the LORD shall dwell in safety by him; shall cover him all the day long, and he shall dwell between his shoulders.

chapters.zh: 论约瑟说：愿他的地蒙耶和华赐福，得天上的宝物、甘露，以及地里所藏的泉水；
chapters.en: And of Joseph he said, Blessed of the LORD his land, for the precious things of heaven, for the dew, and for the deep that coucheth beneath,

chapters.zh: 得太阳所晒熟的美果，月亮所养成的宝物；
chapters.en: And for the precious fruits by the sun, and for the precious things put forth by the moon,

chapters.zh: 得上古之山的至宝，永世之岭的宝物；
chapters.en: And for the chief things of the ancient mountains, and for the precious things of the lasting hills,

chapters.zh: 得地和其中所充满的宝物，并住荆棘中上主的喜悦。愿这些福都归于约瑟的头上，归于那与弟兄迥别之人的顶上。
chapters.en: And for the precious things of the earth and fulness thereof, and the good will of him that dwelt in the bush: let come upon the head of Joseph, and upon the top of the head of him separated from his brethren.

chapters.zh: 他为牛群中头生的，有威严；他的角是野牛的角，用以牴触万邦，直到地极。这角是以法莲的万万，玛拿西的千千。
chapters.en: His glory the firstling of his bullock, and his horns the horns of unicorns: with them he shall push the people together to the ends of the earth: and they the ten thousands of Ephraim, and they the thousands of Manasseh.

chapters.zh: 论西布伦说：西布伦哪，你出外可以欢喜。以萨迦阿，在你帐棚里可以快乐。
chapters.en: And of Zebulun he said, Rejoice, Zebulun, in thy going out; and, Issachar, in thy tents.

chapters.zh: 他们要将列邦召到山上，在那里献公义的祭；因为他们要吸取海里的丰富，并沙中所藏的珍宝。
chapters.en: They shall call the people unto the mountain; there they shall offer sacrifices of righteousness: for they shall suck the abundance of the seas, and treasures hid in the sand.

chapters.zh: 论迦得说：使迦得扩张的应当称颂！迦得住如母狮；他撕裂膀臂，连头顶也撕裂。
chapters.en: And of Gad he said, Blessed he that enlargeth Gad: he dwelleth as a lion, and teareth the arm with the crown of the head.

chapters.zh: 他为自己选择头一段地，因在那里有设立律法者的分存留。他与百姓的首领同来；他施行耶和华的公义和耶和华与以色列所立的典章。
chapters.en: And he provided the first part for himself, because there, a portion of the lawgiver, seated; and he came with the heads of the people, he executed the justice of the LORD, and his judgments with Israel.

chapters.zh: 论但说：但为小狮子，从巴珊跳出来。
chapters.en: And of Dan he said, Dan a lion's whelp: he shall leap from Bashan.

chapters.zh: 论拿弗他利说：拿弗他利阿，你足沾恩惠，满得耶和华的福，可以得西方和南方为业。
chapters.en: And of Naphtali he said, O Naphtali, satisfied with favour, and full with the blessing of the LORD: possess thou the west and the south.

chapters.zh: 论亚设说：愿亚设享受多子的福乐，得他弟兄的喜悦，可以把脚蘸在油中。
chapters.en: And of Asher he said, Asher blessed with children; let him be acceptable to his brethren, and let him dip his foot in oil.

chapters.zh: 你的门闩（门闩或作：鞋）是铜的，铁的。你的日子如何，你的力量也必如何。
chapters.en: Thy shoes iron and brass; and as thy days, thy strength .

chapters.zh: 耶书仑哪，没有能比神的。他为帮助你，乘在天空，显其威荣，驾行穹苍。
chapters.en: none like unto the God of Jeshurun, rideth upon the heaven in thy help, and in his excellency on the sky.

chapters.zh: 永生的神是你的居所；他永久的膀臂在你以下。他在你前面撵出仇敌，说：毁灭罢。
chapters.en: The eternal God refuge, and underneath the everlasting arms: and he shall thrust out the enemy from before thee; and shall say, Destroy .

chapters.zh: 以色列安然居住；雅各的本源独居五谷新酒之地。他的天也滴甘露。
chapters.en: Israel then shall dwell in safety alone: the fountain of Jacob upon a land of corn and wine; also his heavens shall drop down dew.

chapters.zh: 以色列阿，你是有福的！谁像你这蒙耶和华所拯救的百姓呢？他是你的盾牌，帮助你，是你威荣的刀剑。你的仇敌必投降你；你必踏在他们的高处。
chapters.en: Happy thou, O Israel: who like unto thee, O people saved by the LORD, the shield of thy help, and who the sword of thy excellency! and thine enemies shall be found liars unto thee; and thou shalt tread upon their high places.

chapters.zh: 摩西从摩押平原登尼波山，上了那与耶利哥相对的毘斯迦山顶。耶和华把基列全地直到但，
chapters.en: And Moses went up from the plains of Moab unto the mountain of Nebo, to the top of Pisgah, that over against Jericho. And the LORD shewed him all the land of Gilead, unto Dan,

chapters.zh: 拿弗他利全地，以法莲、玛拿西的地，犹大全地直到西海，
chapters.en: And all Naphtali, and the land of Ephraim, and Manasseh, and all the land of Judah, unto the utmost sea,

chapters.zh: 南地和棕树城耶利哥的平原，直到琐珥，都指给他看。
chapters.en: And the south, and the plain of the valley of Jericho, the city of palm trees, unto Zoar.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对他说：这就是我向亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各起誓应许之地，说：我必将这地赐给你的后裔。现在我使你眼睛看见了，你却不得过到那里去。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto him, This the land which I sware unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob, saying, I will give it unto thy seed: I have caused thee to see with thine eyes, but thou shalt not go over thither.

chapters.zh: 于是，耶和华的仆人摩西死在摩押地，正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: So Moses the servant of the LORD died there in the land of Moab, according to the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华将他埋葬在摩押地、伯毘珥对面的谷中，只是到今日没有人知道他的坟墓。
chapters.en: And he buried him in a valley in the land of Moab, over against Bethpeor: but no man knoweth of his sepulchre unto this day.

chapters.zh: 摩西死的时候年一百二十岁；眼目没有昏花，精神没有衰败。
chapters.en: And Moses an hundred and twenty years old when he died: his eye was not dim, nor his natural force abated.

chapters.zh: 以色列人在摩押平原为摩西哀哭了三十日，为摩西居丧哀哭的日子就满了。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel wept for Moses in the plains of Moab thirty days: so the days of weeping mourning for Moses were ended.

chapters.zh: 嫩的儿子约书亚；因为摩西曾按手在他头上，就被智慧的灵充满，以色列人便听从他，照著耶和华吩咐摩西的行了。
chapters.en: And Joshua the son of Nun was full of the spirit of wisdom; for Moses had laid his hands upon him: and the children of Israel hearkened unto him, and did as the LORD commanded Moses.

chapters.zh: 以后以色列中再没有兴起先知像摩西的。他是耶和华面对面所认识的。
chapters.en: And there arose not a prophet since in Israel like unto Moses, whom the LORD knew face to face,

chapters.zh: 耶和华打发他在埃及地向法老和他的一切臣仆，并他的全地，行各样神迹奇事，
chapters.en: In all the signs and the wonders, which the LORD sent him to do in the land of Egypt to Pharaoh, and to all his servants, and to all his land,

chapters.zh: 又在以色列 . 众人眼前显大能的手，行一切大而可畏的事。
chapters.en: And in all that mighty hand, and in all the great terror which Moses shewed in the sight of all Israel.
